name: Beef Taco Bake
description: A delicious Beef Taco Bake recipe featuring Ground beef, Condensed tomato soup, and Salsa.

directions.step: In skillet, cook beef until brown, stirring to separate meat
Pour off fat
Add soup, salsa, milk, tortillas, and half the cheese
Spoon into 2 quart shallow baking dish, cover
Bake at 400 for 30 minutes or until hot
Sprinkle with remaining cheese

name: Taco Dip (Hot)
description: A delicious Taco Dip (Hot) recipe featuring Lipton onion soup mix, Sour cream, and Cream cheese.

directions.step: In a shallow, 1 quart casserole dish, combine: onion soup mix, sour cream, cream cheese, ground beef, and 1/2 cup of shredded cheese
Sprinkle with remaining shredded cheese on top
Bake uncovered 30 minutes or until heated through
Top with lettuce and tomato
Serve with tortilla chips

name: Taco Dip (Cold)
description: A delicious Taco Dip (Cold) recipe featuring Cream cheese, Sour cream, and Milk salsa.

directions.step: Mix together cream cheese and sour cream, set aside
Mix together salsa, set aside
Dice tomato, green pepper, and onion. Mix together
Spread cheese mix on bottom of casserole
Pour salsa on top, then the vegetables, sprinkle with cheese
Serve with tortilla chips

name: Apple Crisp
description: A delicious Apple Crisp recipe featuring Apple, Flour, and Margarine.

directions.step: Place apples in dish, add 1/4 cup of water
Sprinkle with cinnamon
Mix together flour, margarine, and sugar. Place on top of apples
Bake at 350 for 40 minutes or until bubbly

name: Apple Pie
description: A delicious Apple Pie recipe featuring Shortening, Flour, and Apple.

directions.step: Cut flour and shortening together with 2 knives, roll out
Use water between crusts to hold together and add filling
Cut top
Pat pie with milk and sprinkle with sugar
Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes, then 375 for 1 hour and 10-15 minutes

name: Apple Streusel Cookie Tart
description: A delicious Apple Streusel Cookie Tart recipe featuring Refrigerated sugar cookies, Apple, and Granulated sugar.

ingredients.name: Apple
ingredients.prep: Peeled cored and very thinly sliced

directions.step: Heat oven to 375 degrees
Spray 9-inch round springform pan with cooking spray
Press cookie dough in bottom and 2 inches up side of pan
In large bowl, mix: apples, granulated sugar, apple pie spice, and 2 tablespoons of the flour
Toss to coat
Arrange mixture in crust
In a small bowl, mix: oats, brown sugar, and remaining 2 tablespoons of flour
With pastry blender or fork, cut in butter until crumbly
Sprinkle over apples
Top with almonds
Bake 40-45 minutes or until crust is deep golden brown and filling is bubbly
Cool 20 minutes; remove side of pan
Cool 1 hour
Serve with whipped cream

name: Baklava
description: A delicious Baklava recipe featuring Fillo, Honey, and Lemon juice.

directions.step: Mix 1/2 cup of sugar with 1/2 cup of water until it spins a thread
Add honey, lemon juice, and cinnamon; refrigerate
Place 9 layers of fillo on bottom of baking sheet, then some nut mix
Place 5 layers of fillo and then some nut mix 3 times
Brush each layer of fillo with butter
Finish final layer with fillo
Cut into diamonds, then cook at 350 for 35 minutes

name: Blueberry Pie
description: A delicious Blueberry Pie recipe featuring Sugar, Blueberries, and Cinnamon.

directions.step: Bring first 5 ingredients to a rolling boil
Add 3 cups of blueberries (and 1 cup of water if fresh not frozen blueberries)
Place in pie crust
Refrigerate

name: Chocolate truffles
description: A delicious Chocolate truffles recipe featuring Chocolate chips, Oreo cookies, Cream cheese.

directions.step: Crush oreos
Mix with cream cheese
Roll into balls, then roll in melted chocolate chips

name: Christmas Rainbow Cake
description: A delicious Christmas Rainbow Cake recipe featuring White cake mix, Jello raspberry flavor, and Jello lime flavor.

directions.step: Make cake in two 9-inch pans
Cool for 15 minutes
Poke cake with fork at 1/2-inch intervals (leave in pan)
Dissolve each package of jello separately in 1 cup of boiling water
Pour raspberry over one layer and lime over the other
Chill 4 hours
Remove cake from pans, frost with cool whip

name: Mom's Cranberry Apple Pie
description: A delicious Mom's Cranberry Apple Pie recipe featuring Prepared pie crusts, Apple, and Cranberries.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 400 degrees
Fit a pie crust into a 9-inch pie dish and arrange sliced apples into crust
Spread cranberries over apples
Whisk sugar, cornstarch, and cinnamon in a small bowl and sprinkle mixture over cranberries
Disperse butter pieces over pie filling
Place remaining crust over filling
Crimp both crusts together, and cut several slits into top crust to vent steam
Bake until pie is browned and fruit filling is bubbling; 45 minutes to 1 hour

name: French Silk Chocolate Pie
description: A delicious French Silk Chocolate Pie recipe featuring Refrigerated pie crusts, Unsweetened chocolate, and Butter.

directions.step: Heat oven to 450 degrees
Make pie crust as directed on box, using 9-inch glass pie plate
Bake 9-11 minutes or until light golden brown
Cool completely, about 30 minutes
In a 1-quart saucepan, melt chocolate over low heat; cool
In a small bowl with electric mixer, beat butter on medium speed until fluffy
Gradually beat in sugar until light and fluffy
Beat in cooled chocolate and vanilla until well blended
Add eggs 1 at a time, beating on high speed for 2 minutes after each addition. Beat until mixture is smooth and fluffy
Pour into cooled baked shell
Refrigerate at least 2 hours before serving
Garnish with whipped cream and chocolate curls
Cover and refrigerate any remaining pie

name: Chicken, Ziti and Broccoli Penne Pasta
description: A delicious meal with chicken, ziti, and - you guessed it- broccoli

directions.step: Cook penne until al dente; set aside
Saute chicken in olive oil until lightly browned on one side
Turn over and add garlic, crushed red pepper, and broccoli
Cook 1 minute
Add broth and margarine
Continue cooking until broccoli is done

name: Frosted Apple Squares
description: A delicious Frosted Apple Squares recipe featuring Flour, Sugar, and Shortening.

directions.step: Mix flour, sugar, 2 tbsp of sugar, shortening, egg, milk, and egg whites into bowl and shape into ball
Divide in half
Roll onto floured cloth 10x12" rectangle
Place on cookie sheet lined with foil
Sprinkle cornflakes, spread with apples, sugar, and cinnamon
Roll 2nd dough into 10x12", place over filling and pinch edges firmly
Brush top with egg white (sprinkle with sugar and glaze after baking)
Bake at 400 for 40 minutes
Cool slightly and cut into squares while warm

name: Frozen Peanut Butter Treats
description: A delicious Frozen Peanut Butter Treats recipe featuring Creamy peanut butter, Confectioners' sugar, and Vanilla extract.

directions.step: Using an electric mixer or whisk, beat the peanut butter and confectioners' sugar together until smooth and stiff
Beat in vanilla extract
Shape the peanut butter mixture into 20 (1-inch) balls and place on a waxed paper-lined sheet tray
Place the tray in the freezer for 1 hour
Add chopped chocolate to a small bowl. Set over gently simmering water
Stir to melt
Remove chocolate from heat
With 2 forks, carefully dip the chilled peanut butter balls 1/2 way into the chocolate. Let excess drip off, and lay onto the waxed paper-lined sheet tray
With a fork, swirl some decorative chocolate across the top of each bite
Place in refrigerator for the chocolate to set and the peanut butter to solidify, about 30 minutes
Add crushed rice krispies

name: Fruit & Yogurt Layered Salad
description: A delicious Fruit & Yogurt Layered Salad recipe featuring Low-fat strawberry yogurt, Light cream cheese, and Sugar.

directions.step: In a large bowl, combine: yogurt, cream cheese, sugar, lemon juice, and almond extract; beat until smooth
Add whipped topping; beat until thick and smooth
Layer yogurt, then peaches and grapes
Yogurt then pears and strawberries
Yogurt then oranges and blueberries

name: Lemon Lush
description: A delicious Lemon Lush recipe featuring Flour, Butter, and Pecans.

directions.step: Mix: flour, butter, and chopped pecans together like biscuit dough and press into 8x8" baking pan
Bake at 400 degrees for 20 minutes or until brown
Mix together cream cheese, powdered sugar, and 1 cup whipped topping and spread over first layer while still warm
Stir lemon mix, sugar, 1/4 cup water, and egg yolks together in a medium saucepan
Stir in 2 cups water

Stirring constantly, with wire whisk, cook on medium heat until mixture comes to a full boil (NOTE: if you are using instant pudding or a different flavor, use the ingredients & directions for preparation on the package)
Cool 5 minutes, stirring twice
Cool about 30 minutes more and spread over two previous layers
Cool completely and top with remaining whipped topping
Chill

name: No Bake Chocolate Lasagna
description: A delicious No Bake Chocolate Lasagna recipe featuring Oreos, Butter, and Cream cheese.

directions.step: Begin by crushing 36 oreo cookies; I used my food processor for this, but you could also place them in a large ziplock bag and crush them with a rolling pin; When the Oreos have turned into fine crumbs, you are done
Transfer the Oreo crumbs to a large bowl
Stir in 6 tablespoons of melted butter and use a fork to incorporate the butter into the cookie crumbs
When the butter is distributed, transfer the mixture into a 9x13" baking dish
Press the crumbs into the bottom of the pan
Place the pan in the refrigerator while you work on the additional layers
Mix the cream cheese with a mixer until light and fluffy
Add in 2 tablespoons of milk and sugar, mix well
Stir in 1 and 1/4 cups of cool whip
Spread this mixture over the crust
In a bowl, combine instant chocolate pudding with 3 and 1/4 cups of cold milk
Whisk for several minutes until the pudding starts to thicken
Use a spatula to spread the mixture over the previous cream cheese layer
Allow the dessert to rest for about 5 minutes so that the pudding can firm up further
Spread the remaining cool whip over the top
Sprinkle mini chocolate chips, walnuts, almonds, and whatever you choose evenly over the top
Place in the freezer for 1 hour, or refrigerator for 4 hours before serving

name: Peanut Butter Hot Fudge Cake
description: A delicious Peanut Butter Hot Fudge Cake recipe featuring Peanut butter, Milk, and Butter.

directions.step: In a small bowl or measuring cup, blend together peanut butter, milk, melted butter, and vanilla (I find placing the whole thing in the microwave for 20 seconds or so makes the blending much easier)
In a large bowl, place: flour, 1/2 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt
Whisk together well, then pour the peanut butter mixture over the top of the dry ingredients
Mix together to form a thick cake batter (depending on your peanut butter, your batter may be thick like a quick bread, or thinner like a regular cake batter)
If the batter is very thick, add another 2-3 tablespoons of milk to make it more pourable
Place the batter into a well greased 4-6 quart slow cooker
Create chocolate fudge sauce: combine 1/2 cup sugar and cocoa powder with 1 cup of boiling water and whisk together into a thin chocolate liquid
Pour this over the top of the peanut butter batter in the crock; DO NOT STIR TOGETHER
Cover the cooker and "bake" on high for 2-3 hours

name: Peanut Butter Pie
description: A delicious Peanut Butter Pie recipe featuring Prepared chocolate cookie pie crust, Creamy peanut butter, and Sugar.

directions.step: Combine in a medium bowl: Peanut butter, cream cheese, and sugar
Gently fold in 3 cups whipped topping
Spoon mixture into pie shell
Place hot fudge topping in microwave for 1 minute; stir
Spread hot fudge over pie to cover peanut butter layer; refrigerate until serving time
Just before serving, spread whipped topping over hot fudge layer

name: Whoopie Pie
description: A delicious Whoopie Pie recipe featuring Shortening, Granulated sugar, and Confectionary sugar.

directions.step: Mix 1/2 cup shortening, granulated sugar, egg, milk, 1 tsp vanilla, flour, cocoa powder, baking soda, and baking powder together to make ends
Mix 1/2 cup shortening, confectionary sugar, fluff, 1/2 tsp vanilla, and a few drops of milk to make filling
Place ends on cookie sheet and bake at 425 degrees for 7 minutes
Combine two ends with filling and serve

name: American Chop Suey
description: A delicious American Chop Suey recipe featuring Green pepper, Onion, and Can of tomato soup.

directions.step: Cook pepper and onion, add hamburg
Cook hamburg until no longer pink, drain
Add soup and 1/3 can of water
Add spaghetti, mix well and serve

name: Bacon-Cheeseburger Potato Pie
description: A delicious Bacon-Cheeseburger Potato Pie recipe featuring Lean ground beef, Bread crumbs, and Onion.

directions.step: In medium bowl, combine: beef, bread crumbs, onion, ketchup, and mustard
Press mixture in bottom and sides of 9-inch pie plate
Bake at 375 for 15 minutes
Cook bacon
In saucepan, combine: 1 1/4 cup water, margarine, and garlic salt
Bring to a boil
Remove from heat and add milk
With fork, stir in potato flakes
Remove beef crust from oven and pour off drippings
Spoon potato mixture evenly into crust
Return to oven and bake 15 minutes
Remove pie from oven and top with remaining cheese and crumbled up bacon
Return to oven for 5 additional minutes
Let stand 10 minutes before serving

name: Cheeseburger Mac
description: A delicious Cheeseburger Mac recipe featuring Ground beef, Ketchup, and Onion powder.

directions.step: Brown meat in a large skillet, drain
Stir in 2 3/4 cups water, ketchup, and onion powder
Bring to a boil
Stir in macaroni
Reduce heat to med-low; cover
Simmer 8-10 minutes or until macaroni is tender
Add Velveeta, stir until melted

name: Easy Chow Mein Casserole
description: A delicious Easy Chow Mein Casserole recipe featuring Lean ground beef, Garlic pepper blend, and Long-grain rice.

directions.step: Heat oven to 375 degrees
In 10-inch non-stick skillet, crumble beef, sprinkle with garlic pepper
Cook over medium-high heat for 5-7 minutes, stirring occasionally until brown, drain
In ungreased 11x7" glass baking dish, mix beef, rice, broth, teriyaki sauce, and 1/4 cup water
Stir in vegetables
Cover dish with foil
Bake 50-55 minutes or until rice is tender
Uncover and stir; sprinkle with chow mein noodles and cashews
Bake uncovered 10-15 minutes long or until noodles are golden

name: Biscuit Taco Cups
description: A delicious Biscuit Taco Cups recipe featuring Lean ground beef, Spicy chili beans, and Taco seasoning mix.

directions.step: Heat oven to 375 degrees
Brown ground beef in a large skillet over medium high heat until thoroughly cooked; stirring frequently. Drain
Add chili beans, taco seasoning mix, and 1/2 cup water; mix well
Reduce heat to medium; simmer 10 minutes or until ground beef mixture is slightly thickened, stirring occasionally
Meanwhile, spray outside bottom and sides of 8 (60z) custard cups lightly with nonstick cooking spray
Separate dough into 8 biscuits
Roll or pat each biscuit to form 4 1/2" round biscuits
Place rounds over outside of sprayed cups; press to fit over bottom and part way down sides of cups
Place cups, upside down in ungreased 15x10x1" baking pan
Bake at 375 degrees for 14-16 minutes, or until deep golden brown
Remove pan from oven
Carefully remove biscuit cups from custard cups
Place biscuit cups, right side up, in same baking pan
Spoon beef mixture evenly into each cup
Top with cheese, lettuce, tomato, and salsa

name: Shepards Pie
description: A delicious Shepards Pie recipe featuring Corn, Cream corn, and Hamburg.

directions.step: Peel and cut up potatoes for making mashed potatoes
Cook hamburg until no longer pink
Combine corn, cream corn, and hamburg together
Place in casserole dish and top with mashed potatoes
Cook 350 degrees for 45 minutes

name: Stuffed Peppers
description: A delicious Stuffed Peppers recipe featuring Green peppers, Ground beef, and Margarine.

directions.step: Cut peppers in half
Cook hamburg until brown
Add onion, garlic, thyme, bayleaf, parsley, and tarragon
Add rice and eggs
Stuff peppers and sprinkle with cheese and bread crumbs
Pour tomatoes over peppers
Add chicken broth
Bake at 350 for 45 minutes

name: Taco Mac Casserole
description: A delicious Taco Mac Casserole recipe featuring Ground beef, Taco seasoning, and Macaroni and cheese.

directions.step: Brown ground beef in skillet, drain grease
Add taco seasoning and 2/3 cup water and simmer until most liquid is absorbed
Meanwhile, prepare macaroni and cheese according to box directions using the butter and milk
Stir in sour cream to the macaroni and cheese
Spread half of the macaroni and cheese on the bottom of a 2-quart baking dish
Top with meat and sprinkle 1/2 cup shredded cheese
Add second half of macaroni and cheese
Cover and bake at 400 degrees for 15 minutes
Remove foil and spread salsa over top
Sprinkle remaining 1/2 cup shredded cheese over salsa
Bake an additional 5 minutes or until cheese is melted

name: Tex-Mex Meatball Pie
description: A delicious Tex-Mex Meatball Pie recipe featuring Refrigerated pie crust, Frozen cooked meatballs, and Frozen corn.

directions.step: Unroll pie crust on ungreased cookie sheet
Place meatballs on center of crust
In a small bowl, mix corn and 1/2 cup of salsa
Spoon corn mixture over meatballs
Fold edges of crust over filling
Bake 35-40 minutes or until crust is a deep golden brown
Sprinkle with cheese
Bake 3-5 minutes longer
Top with lettuce and sour cream
Drizzle with remaining salsa

name: Time to Spare Ribs
description: A delicious Time to Spare Ribs recipe featuring Flour, Large cooking bag, and Barbecue sauce.

directions.step: Shake flour in cooking bag
Add barbecue sauce, onion, and green pepper
Squeeze bag to blend ingredients
Cut ribs into serving size pieces, place in bag
Turn bag to coat ribs with sauce
Arrange ribs in even layer, close bag with nylon tie; make 6 1/2 inch slits in top
Place in 13x9" pan
Sauce may cause inside of bag to darken, this does not indicate burning
Cook 1 1/2 hours at 325

name: Apple Cinnamon Loaf
description: A delicious Apple Cinnamon Loaf recipe featuring Brown sugar, Ground cinnamon, and Sugar.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Grease and flour a 9x5" loaf pan
Mix brown sugar and cinnamon together in a bowl and set aside
Beat white sugar and butter together in a bowl using an electric mixer until smooth and creamy
Beat in eggs, 1 at a time, until incorporated. Add vanilla extract
Combine flour and baking powder together in another bowl; Stir into creamed butter mixture
Mix milk into batter until smooth
Pour half the batter into the prepared loaf pan
Add half the apple and half the brown sugar cinnamon mixture
Lightly pat apple mixture into batter
Pour the remaining batter over apple layer; top with remaining apples and add more brown sugar/cinnamon mixture
Lightly pat apples into batter; swirl brown sugar mixture through apples using a finger or spoon
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted in the center of the loaf comes out clean, 30-40 minutes

name: Banana Bread Crunch Cake
description: A delicious Banana Bread Crunch Cake recipe featuring Flour, Sugar, and Baking powder.

directions.step: Heat oven to 375 degrees
Spray 9" square pan with cooking spray
In a large bowl, mix: 1 cup flour, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and 1/4 tsp salt
Add 1/2 cup of melted butter, milk, egg, vanilla; mix well
Mash 1 banana (about 1/2 cup) and add to batter; mix well
Pour into pan
Cut remaining banana into 1/4" slices; place in single layer over batter
In a medium bowl, mix 1/2 cup of flour, the brown sugar, oats, and 1/8 tsp of salt
Stir in 1/2 cup of melted butter
Add cereal and pecans; mix well
Sprinkle topping over banana slices
Bake 30 minutes
Remove from oven, loosely cover with foil
Bake 10-15 minutes longer or until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean
Place on cooling rack; cool 15 minutes before serving
Serve with vanilla ice cream

name: Blueberry Muffins
description: A delicious Blueberry Muffins recipe featuring Margarine, Sugar, and Milk.

directions.step: Cream butter and sugar until fluffy
Add eggs one at a time
Mix well and add dry ingredients with milk
Mash and stir 1/2 cup of blueberries
Add to mix with remaining berries by hand
Grease muffin tins or use paper cups and bake
Sprinkle sugar on top of muffins before baking
Bake at 375 degrees for 25-30 minutes

name: Homemade Cinnamon Rolls
description: A delicious Homemade Cinnamon Rolls recipe featuring Flour, Active dry yeast, and Milk.

directions.step: In a large mixing bowl, combine: 2 1/4 cups of flour and the yeast
In a saucepan, heat and stir milk, butter, sugar, and salt until just warm
Add to flour mixture, along with the eggs
Beat on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl
Beat on high for 3 minutes
Stir in at least two more cups of flour, adding more until the dough is stiff
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface
Knead in enough of the remaining flour to make a moderately soft dough that is smooth and elastic (3-5 minutes total)
Shape dough into ball
Place into greased bowl, turn once. Cover
Let rise in a warm place until doubled in size, about 1 hour
Punch dough down
Turn out onto lightly floured surface
Divide in half. Cover
Let sit for 10 minutes
Meanwhile, lightly grease two 9x1 1/2" round baking pans
For filling, stir together brown sugar, 1/4 cup flour, and cinnamon
Cut in 1/3 cup butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs
Roll each half of dough into 12x8" rectangle
Sprinkle filling over dough rectangles
Scatter with raisin and pecans
Roll up each rectangle starting from a long side
Seal seams
Slice each roll into 12 pieces
Place cut sides down in prepared pans
Cover dough loosely with plastic wrap, leaving room for rolls to rise
Chill for 2-24 hours; uncover
Let stand at room temperature for 30 minutes (This will produce the best flavor)
However, if you want to bake the rolls right away (and really, who wants to wait 24 hours for delicious cinnamon rolls?), don't chill the dough
Instead, cover loosely, let dough rise in a warm place until nearly double, about 30 minutes
When ready to bake, brush dough with 1 tablespoon of light cream
Bake at 375 degrees for 20-25 minutes, or until light brown
While the rolls are baking, prepare the glaze
In a small bowl, stir together the powdered sugar, corn syrup, and vanilla
Add enough light cream to reach drizzling consistency
When the rolls are done, remove from oven and set on a wire rack for 1 minute
Drizzle with vanilla glaze
Serve warm (with good, strong coffee)

name: Cinnamon Sugar Pull Apart Loaf
description: A delicious Cinnamon Sugar Pull Apart Loaf recipe featuring Sugar, Cinnamon, and Margarine or butter.

directions.step: Heat oven to 400 degrees
Generously grease 8x4" loaf pan
In a small, shallow bowl, combine sugar and cinnamon; mix well
Separate dough into 10 biscuits; cut each into quarters
Dip each quarter into melted margarine; roll in sugar-cinnamon mixture
Arrange in greased loaf pan
Bake at 400 degrees for 19-27 minutes
Cool 2 minutes
Loosen edges; remove from pan
Place on serving plate, serve warm

name: French Toast Casserole
description: A delicious French Toast Casserole recipe featuring French bread, Egg, and Milk.

directions.step: Place bread cubes in greased, 13x9x2" baking dish
In mixing bowl, beat eggs, milk, sugar, and vanilla
Pour over bread
Cover and refrigerate 8 hours or overnight
Remove from refrigerator 30 minutes before baking
Dot with butter
Combine sugar and cinnamon, sprinkle over top
Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 45-50 minutes or until knife inserted comes out clean
Let stand for 5 minutes

name: Lemon Bread
description: A delicious Lemon Bread recipe featuring Butter, Egg, and Flour.

directions.step: Add 1/2 cup sugar to squeezed lemon juice
Cream together butter and sugar
Add eggs; beat
Add lemon rind and remaining ingredients except lemon juice
Pour juice and sugar over hot bread
Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour

name: Monkey Bread Minis
description: A delicious Monkey Bread Minis recipe featuring Margarine, Brown sugar, and Sugar.

directions.step: Grease or spray 12 regular size muffin cups
Mix butter and brown sugar; spoon 1 tablespoon mixture into each muffin cup
Mix granulated sugar and cinnamon in 1 gallon bag
Separate dough into 20 biscuits; cut in 6 pieces
Shake pieces in bag to coat
Place 10 pieces in each muffin cup
Bake at 350 for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown
Cool 1 minute, turn upside down
Serve warm
For dipping sauce, mix sugar with water and stir to desired consistency

name: Oatmeal
description: A delicious Oatmeal recipe featuring Apple, Brown sugar, and Cinnamon.

directions.step: Place apples, brown sugar, cinnamon, and salt in the bottom of the crockpot
Pour in oatmeal, milk, and 2 cups of water; Do NOT stir
Cook overnight for 8-9 hours on low

name: Overnight Breakfast Bake
description: A delicious Overnight Breakfast Bake recipe featuring Refrigerated cinnamon rolls with cream cheese icing, Cream cheese, and Egg.

ingredients.name: Refrigerated cinnamon rolls with cream cheese icing

directions.step: Heat oven to 375 degrees
Grease 13x9" glass baking dish with shortening, or spray with cooking spray
Separate dough from both cans into 16 rolls; return icing to refrigerator
Arrange rolls as evenly as possible in baking dish
Bake 13-17 minutes or until golden brown on top
Remove from oven to cooling rack; cool completely (about 30 minutes)
When rolls are cool, cut each into 9 pieces; cutting lengthwise into 3 pieces, then cutting each piece into thirds
Remove half of pieces from baking dish
Distribute remaining half of pieces evenly in bottom of baking dish
Cut block of cream cheese into 8 rows by 5 rows to make 40 small squares
Evenly distribute cream cheese squares over roll pieces in baking dish
Layer second half of roll pieces evenly over cream cheese; set aside
In a large bowl, beat: eggs, sugar, cinnamon, half and half, and vanilla with whisk until well combined
Pour egg mixture evenly over top of casserole
With back of spoon, press mixture down so roll pieces absorb as much of egg mixture as possible
Cover dish with foil; refrigerate overnight (6-8 hours)
Heat oven to 350 degrees
Uncover baking dish; bake 35-45 minutes or until browned and set
Place small scoops of icing over warm casserole; let stand until melted
With knife or metal spatula, carefully spread icing over top of casserole
Serve warm

name: Sour Cream Coffee Cake
description: A delicious Sour Cream Coffee Cake recipe featuring Yellow cake mix, Instant vanilla pudding, and Egg.

directions.step: Mix cinnamon and sugar together
Mix all other ingredients
Pour 1/2 of the batter in a tube pan, sprinkle with cinnamon sugar mix
Pour in rest of batter, sprinkle with cinnamon sugar mix
Put nuts on top

name: Baked Chicken with Rice
description: A delicious Baked Chicken with Rice recipe featuring Onion soup mix, Uncle Ben's Rice, and Chicken.

directions.step: Sprinkle onion soup across the bottom of a shallow roasting pan
Add rice, then chicken
Mix cream of chicken soup and 2 cans of water together, pour over chicken
Add a little pepper
Cook at 1 1/2 hours at 325 degrees

name: Buffalo Chicken Lasagna
description: A delicious Buffalo Chicken Lasagna recipe featuring Bulk ground chicken, Unsalted butter, and Flour.

directions.step: Heat oven to 400 degrees
In 10" skillet, cook chicken until no longer pink
Transfer chicken to large bowl
In same skillet, melt butter over medium heat
Stir in flour until well blended
Gradually add chicken broth, beating with whisk after each addition
Make sure mixture is smooth and lump-free before adding more broth
Keep doing this until all of the broth has been added
Remove skillet from heat
Stir in sour cream with whisk until well combined
Stir in wing sauce
Add cooked chicken; mix well
Set aside
Unroll dough onto work surface dusted lightly with flour
Cut dough in half; set 1 half aside
Using rolling pin, roll dough until about 1/4" thick
Spoon small amount of chicken mixture into ungreased 11x7" (or 12x8") glass baking dish
Cut strips of dough to roughly fit on top of chicken mixture; arrange over mixture
Sprinkle some of the cheese over top; add more chicken mixture
Repeat layering 2 more times, using remaining half of dough an all of the chicken mixture (make sure to end with chicken on the surface)
Top with remaining cheese
Bake 45 minutes or until cheese is golden brown and bubbly
Cool 10 minutes before serving

name: Buffalo Chicken Pot Pie
description: A delicious Buffalo Chicken Pot Pie recipe featuring Butter, White onion, and Celery.

directions.step: Heat oven to 400 degrees
In 3-quart saucepan, melt butter over medium heat
Add onion, cook 3-5 minutes or until softened
Add celery and carrots; cook 5-7 minutes
Remove and discard skin from chicken
Remove chicken from bones; cut chicken into small pieces and discard bones
In a large bowl, toss vegetable mixture, chicken, buffalo wing sauce, and cheese until well mixed
Make pie crusts as directed on box for Two-Crust Pie using 10" glass deep-dish pie plate
Pour chicken mixture into crust-lined plate
Top with second crust and flute; cut slits in several pieces
Bake 25-35 minutes or until edge is golden brown

name: Cheesy Chicken Enchiladas
description: A delicious Cheesy Chicken Enchiladas recipe featuring Chicken breast, Shredded Mexican blend cheese, and Plain low-fat yogurt.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Combine first 9 ingredients in a large bowl
Remove 1 cup chicken mixture; set mixture aside
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat
Working with 1 tortilla at a time, brush oil over both sides of tortilla
Add tortilla to pan; cook 5 seconds on each side or until toasted and soft
Remove from pan; arrange 1/2 cup chicken mixture down center of tortilla
Roll jelly-roll style; place filled tortilla, seam side down, in a 13x9" baking dish coated with cooking spray
Repeat procedure with remaining 7 tortillas
Spread reserved 1 cup chicken mixture evenly over tortillas
Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes
Uncover; sprinkle evenly with cheddar cheese and green onions; bake an additional 5 minutes or until cheese melts

name: Cheesy Chicken Tortilla Lasagna
description: A delicious Cheesy Chicken Tortilla Lasagna recipe featuring Taco sauce, Seasoned cooked chicken breast strips, and Sour cream.

directions.step: Spray 13x9" glass baking dish
Reserve 1/4 cup taco sauce
In a large bowl, mix remaining taco sauce, chicken, sour cream, 1/4 cup onions, and taco seasoning mix
Spoon 1/4 cup taco sauce on bottom of pan
Arrange tortilla pieces (8) over sauce, overlapping as necessary
Spoon 1/2 chicken mixture over tortilla; sprinkle with 2/3 cup of cheese
Repeat layers
Cover with foil
Bake 375 degrees for 30-35 minutes
Uncover; layer tortilla chips, tomatoes, remaining onion, and cheese on top
Bake uncovered 5 minutes
Let sit 10 minutes before serving

name: Cheesy Stuffed Pepper Casserole
description: A delicious Cheesy Stuffed Pepper Casserole recipe featuring Rice, Ground beef, and Olive oil.

directions.step: Brown ground beef in a large stock pot, drain, remove from pan, and set aside
Heat oil in stock pot on medium-high heat; add green peppers and onion
Saute 5-10 minutes or until softened, stirring occasionally
To stock pot, add tomatoes, sauce, corn, garlic powder, salt, and pepper
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer 5 minutes
Stir in rice
Pour into a 9x13" baking dish
Top with shredded cheese
Bake at 350 for 12-15 minutes or until cheese is melted

name: Chicken Alfredo Pizza
description: A delicious Chicken Alfredo Pizza recipe featuring Pillsbury refrigerated thin pizza crust, Alfredo sauce, and Chicken.

ingredients.name: Shredded Italian cheese blend or mozzarella cheese

directions.step: Heat oven to 400 degrees
Grease 15x10" (or larger) nonstick cookie sheet with shortening
Unroll dough onto cookie sheet
Starting at center, press out dough into 15x10" rectangle
Bake 7 minutes then remove from oven
Spread sauce over warm crust
Top with chicken, bell pepper, and cheese
Bake 6-10 minutes or until cheese is melted and crust is golden brown

name: Chicken and Noodle Skillet
description: A delicious Chicken and Noodle Skillet recipe featuring Vegetable oil, Chicken breast, and Baby carrots.

ingredients.name: Chicken breast
ingredients.prep: Boneless skinless cut into bite-sized pieces

directions.step: In skillet, heat over medium-high heat
Cook chicken and onion in oil for 6-8 minutes, stirring frequently until brown and onion is tender
Stir in remaining ingredients
Heat to boil, reduce heat
Cover and simmer 10 minutes
Uncover and simmer 5-8 minutes longer, stirring occasionally until noodles are tender

name: Chicken Broccoli Alfredo
description: A delicious Chicken Broccoli Alfredo recipe featuring Chicken breasts, Frozen broccoli florets, and Alfredo sauce.

directions.step: Place all ingredients in a resealable gallon-sized freezer bag and mix together
When ready to eat, remove from freezer and thaw in fridge for 24 hours
Cook on low in crockpot for 4-6 hours

name: Chicken Fettuccine Casserole
description: A delicious Chicken Fettuccine Casserole recipe featuring Refrigerated fettuccine, Butter/margarine, and Flour.

directions.step: Heat oven to 350 degrees
Spray square baking dish, 8x8x2" with cooking spray
Cook and drain fettuccine as directed on package
While fettuccine is cooking, melt butter in 2-quart saucepan over medium heat
Stir in flour
Gradually stir in broth
Heat to boiling, stirring constantly; remove from heat
Stir in half and half
Stir in chicken, tomatoes, and bacon
Add fettuccine to chicken mixture; toss gently to mix well
Spoon into baking dish
Sprinkle with cheese
Bake uncovered about 30 minutes or until hot in the center

name: Chicken Parmesan
description: A delicious Chicken Parmesan recipe featuring Egg, Bread crumbs, and Parmesan cheese.

directions.step: Beat 1-2 eggs with a little milk in a bowl
Mix bread crumbs and parmesan cheese in a separate bowl
Take chicken cutlets and dip in egg, then bread crumbs
Heat a small amount of vegetable oil in a pan, place breaded cutlets in pan and brown on both sides
Layer spaghetti sauce, chicken, mozarella, and spaghetti sauce in a casserole dish

name: Chicken Quesadillas
description: A delicious Chicken Quesadillas recipe featuring Extra virgin olive oil, Bell pepper, and Onion.

directions.step: In a large skillet over medium-high heat, heat olive oil
Add peppers and onion; season with salt and pepper
Cook until soft, 5 minutes; transfer to a plate
Heat remaining tablespoon vegetable oil over medium-high heat
Season chicken with spices, salt, and pepper; cook, stirring occasionally until golden and cooked through (8 minutes); transfer to a plate
Add 1 flour tortilla to skillet and top half of the tortilla with a heavy sprinkling of both cheeses, cooked chicken mixture, pepper-onion mixture, a few slices of avocado, and green onions
Fold the other half of the tortilla over and cook, flipping once, until golden (3 minutes per side)
Repeat to make 4 quesadillas
Slice into wedges and serve with sour cream

name: Chicken Tetrazzini
description: A delicious Chicken Tetrazzini recipe featuring Unsalted butter, Cooking spray, and Onion.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Melt butter in a large stockpot over medium-high heat
Add onion, celery, black pepper, salt, and mushrooms; saute 4 minutes or until mushrooms are tender
Add sherry; cook 1 minute
Weigh or lightly spoon flour into dry measuring cups; level with knife
Gradually add flour to pan; cook 3 minutes, stirring constantly (mixture will be thick) with a whisk
Gradually add broth, stirring constantly
Bring to a boil
Reduce heat; simmer 5 minutes, stirring frequently
Remove from heat
Add 1 3/4 cups of parmesan cheese and cream cheese, stirring with a whisk until cream cheese melts
Add pasta and chicken; stir until blended
Divide pasta mixture between 2 (8" square) glass or ceramic baking dishes coated with cooking spray
Place bread in food processor; pulse 10 times or until coarse crumbs form
Combine breadcrumbs and 1/2 cup of parmesan cheese; sprinkle evenly over pasta
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until lightly browned and bubbly
Remove casserole from oven; let stand 15 minutes
To freeze unbaked casserole: prepare through step 5
Cool completely in refrigerator
Cover with plastic wrap, pressing to remove as much air as possible
Wrap with heavy-duty foil
Store in freezer for up to 2 months

name: Classic Chicken Pot Pie
description: A delicious Classic Chicken Pot Pie recipe featuring Pillsbury refrigerated pie crusts, Butter/margarine, and Onion.

directions.step: Heat oven to 425 degrees
Make pie crusts as directed on box for Two-Crust Pie using 9" glass pie pan
In 2-quart saucepan, melt butter over medium heat
Add onion; cook 2 minutes, stirring frequently until tender
Stir in flour, salt, and pepper until well blended
Gradually stir in broth and milk, cooking and stirring until bubbly and thickened
Stir in chicken and mixed vegetables
Remove from heat
Spoon chicken mixture into crust-lined pan
Top with second crust; seal edge and flute
Cut slits in several places in top crust
Bake 30-40 minutes or until crust is golden brown
During last 15-20 minutes of baking, cover crust edge with strips of foil to prevent excessive browning
Let stand 5 minutes before serving

name: Crisp Crusted Baked Chicken
description: A delicious Crisp Crusted Baked Chicken recipe featuring Chicken, Egg, and Milk.

directions.step: Wash chicken pieces, pat dry
Beat egg and milk together in a bowl
In another bowl, mix potato flakes, garlic salt, and parmesan cheese
Roll chicken first in egg mix, then in potato flakes mix
Melt butter in a shallow baking pan
Roll coated chicken pieces in the butter and place them skin side up in pan
Bake at 400 degrees for 45-50 minutes

name: Crispy Chip Chicken
description: A delicious Crispy Chip Chicken recipe featuring BBQ flavor corn chips, Egg, and Milk.

directions.step: Place chips in ziploc bag and crush to make 2 cups of coarse crumbs
In bowl, mix egg and milk
Dip chicken in egg, then roll in crumbs
Press crumbs against chicken so they stick
Place chicken in 9x13" pan, sprinkle with remaining crumbs
Melt margarine and pour over chicken
Bake 1 hour at 375 degrees

name: Easy Bistro Chicken
description: A delicious Easy Bistro Chicken recipe featuring Olive oil, Chicken breast halves, and Chicken thighs.

directions.step: Heat 1 1/2 tsp oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat
Add chicken breast halves to pan; saute 2 minutes on each side or until lightly browned
Remove from pan
Add 1 1/2 teaspoons oil and remaining chicken pieces; saute 2 minutes on each side or until lightly browned
Remove chicken from pan
Heat 1 tbsp oil in pan
Add onion and garlic; saute 5 minutes
Add celery; saute 5 minutes
Add basil, parsley, vinegar, olives, capers, sugar, ground red pepper, bay leaves, and tomatoes
Return chicken to pan; bring to a boil
Cover, reduce heat, and simmer 20 minutes
Uncover and simmer 25 minutes or until chicken is tender
Discard bay leaves
Serve with pasta, garnish with parsley if desired

name: Easy Chicken and Garden Veggies
description: A delicious Easy Chicken and Garden Veggies recipe featuring Bacon, Chicken breasts, and Garlic salt.

directions.step: In 12" nonstick skillet, cook bacon over medium heat 3-4 minutes, stirring occasionally until crisp
Sprinkle both sides of chicken with garlic salt and pepper
Add chicken to bacon in skillet
Cook 3-5 minutes or until browned on both sides
Discard excess bacon drippings
Add 1/4 cup of water and beans to skillet
Cook and cover over medium-low heat for 8 minutes
Stir in bell pepper
Cover and cook 3-5 minutes, turning and stirring occasionally
Stir in tomatoes and dressing
Cook uncovered for 2 minutes

name: Flaky Chicken Wraps
description: A delicious Flaky Chicken Wraps recipe featuring Oil, Ranch dressing salad mix, and Grands flaky biscuits.

ingredients.name: Refrigerated fully cooked grilled chicken breast strips

directions.step: Heat oven to 350 degrees
Lightly grease cookie sheet
In a small bowl, combine oil and tablespoon of salad dressing mix; mix until well blended
Separate dough into 8 biscuits
Press or roll to form 6" oval
Spread teaspoon of salad dressing mixture on each biscuit
Arrange about 3 chicken breast strips crosswise on center of each biscuit
Bring long ends of biscuit ovals up over chicken, overlapping and pinching to seal
Brush each biscuit with melted butter
Sprinkle tops evenly with 2 teaspoons of dry salad dressing mix
Bake at 350 degrees for 18-22 minutes or until golden brown

name: Crispy Honeyed Soy Chicken Wings
description: A delicious Crispy Honeyed Soy Chicken Wings recipe featuring Black pepper, Ground ginger, and Worcestershire sauce.

directions.step: Cut the wings from the drumsticks and tips using poultry shears
Wash the wings and drumsticks well and pat dry with a paper towel
Combine the Worcestershire and soy sauce in a large bowl with the honey and whisk until the honey is dissolved
Add the black pepper and ginger; Stir
Add the dried chicken to the marinade along with the sliced spring onions
Cover and marinate in the fridge for 3 hours or at room temperature (away from direct sunlight) for 1 hour
Preheat the oven to 450 degrees
After an hour or three has passed, strain the chicken, reserving the marinade liquid
Boil the chicken for about 5 minutes; arrange on a wire rack and allow to drip dry; pat dry if needed
Put the chicken skin side down on a baking tray and bake 30 minutes
Flip the chicken over and bake for 10 minutes further
While the chicken bakes, boil the leftover marinade to make a glaze; be sure that you bring the sauce to a rolling boil as this is necessary to kill any bacteria left from the raw chicken
Continue to boil and reduce the liquid until it coats the back of a spoon (like when making custard)
Toss the wings in the glaze and serve immediately with plenty of napkins and ice cold beer (beer optional, sort of)

name: Healthified Chicken Pot Pie
description: A delicious Healthified Chicken Pot Pie recipe featuring Frozen mixed vegetables, Flour, and Salt.

ingredients.name: Condensed 98% fat-free cream of chicken soup
Chicken breast
ingredients.prep: Boneless skinless cooked and cut into bite-sized pieces

directions.step: Cook and drain vegetables as directed on bag
Heat oven to 375 degrees
In 2-quart saucepan, mix flour, salt, poultry seasoning, pepper, and milk with wire whisk until blended
Stir in onion
Cook over medium heat 4-6 minutes, stirring constantly, until thickened
Stir in soup and sour cream
Add chicken and cooked vegetables; mix well
Cook, stirring frequently until thoroughly heated
Pour into ungreased 2-quart round casserole dish
Unroll pie crust; place over hot filling
Seal edge and flute as desired
Cut slits in several places in crust
Bake 35-40 minutes or until crust is golden brown and mixture is bubbly
Let stand 10 minutes before serving

name: Honey Mustard Chicken
description: A delicious Honey Mustard Chicken recipe featuring Butter, Honey, and Dijon mustard.

directions.step: Melt butter
Add honey, mustard, and curry; pour over chicken
Bake 350 degrees for 40-45 minutes

name: Loaded Chicken and Potatoes
description: A delicious Loaded Chicken and Potatoes recipe featuring Chicken breast, Skin-on red potatoes, and Olive oil.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 400 degrees
Spray 9x13" baking dish with cooking spray
In a large bowl, mix together the olive oil, salt, pepper, paprika, garlic powder, and hot sauce
Add the cubed potatoes and chicken and stir to coat
Carefully scoop the potatoes and chicken into the prepared baking dish
Bake the potatoes and chicken 55-60 minutes, stirring every 20 minutes, until cooked through, crispy, and browned on the outside
While the potatoes are cooking, fry your bacon
Once the potatoes and chicken are fully cooked, remove from the oven
Top the cooked potatoes with the cheese, bacon, and green onion
Return the casserole to the oven and bake for 5 minutes or until cheese is melted
Serve with extra hot sauce and/or ranch dressing or sour cream

name: Apple Cake
description:
Cook Time - 45 min
Recipe came from Edie Fountain (Phyllis' friend from high school). Swedish

directions.step: Heat oven to 350
Combine sugar, vanilla, butter and eggs
Add 1/2 flour, 1/2 baking powder, 1/2 milk, combine well
Add remaining flour, baking powder and milk
Pour into a greased and floured 9 x 13 pan
Add apple slices in rows
Combine brown sugar and cinamon and put on top of cake
Bake for approx 45 minutes - or until a toothpick comes out clean

name: Blueberry Coffee Cake
description:
Cook time 45 min
Recipe came from Edie Fountain (friend of Phyllis from high school) Swedish

directions.step: Preheat oven to 350
Combine shortening, butter, sugar, vanilla and eggs
Add flour, baking powder  and milk
Flour the blueberries and add to the batter
Pour into a 9 x 13 pan
Combine cinamon and brown sugar (I usually do extra topping), sprinkle on top of cake
Bake for approx 45 minutes (or until a toothpick comes out clean)

name: Sams Chicken (teriyaki)
description: Cook time 1 hour - This was a recipe from Aunt Elsie

directions.step: Pour oil to cover the bottom of the kettle. Add chicken, soy sauce, water, garlic, ginger, tabasco and celery
Bring to a boil and then cook for 1 hour on low heat
Add scallions and pea pods
Take chicken out and thicken gravy with a mixture of cornstarch and water.
Add chicken back into pot and then serve over cooked rice.

name: One Dish Chicken Bake
description: A delicious One Dish Chicken Bake recipe featuring Stove top stuffing for chicken, Chicken breast, and Cream of chicken soup.

directions.step: Prepare stuffing according to package
Place chicken in 12x8" baking dish
Mix soup and milk, pour over chicken
Top with stuffing
Bake at 375 for 35 minutes

name: Sweet Honey Chicken Wings
description: A delicious Sweet Honey Chicken Wings recipe featuring Chicken wings, Soy sauce, and Sugar.

directions.step: Mix ingredients together
Pour marinate over chicken and refrigerate for at least 24 hours
Turn chicken occasionally to coat all pieces
Bake 1 hour for 350 degrees

name: Brown Sugar and Balsamic Glazed Pork Loin
description: A delicious Brown Sugar and Balsamic Glazed Pork Loin recipe featuring Boneless pork loin, Pepper, and Garlic.

directions.step: Combine pepper and garlic; rub over roast
Place in slow cooker with 1/2 cup water
Cook on low for 6-8 hours
About 1 hour before roast is done, combine ingredients for glaze with 1/2 cup water in a small saucepan
Heat and stir until mixture thickens
Brush roast with glaze 2-3 times during the last hour of cooking
Serve with remaining glaze on side

name: Cafe Rio Chicken
description: A delicious Cafe Rio Chicken recipe featuring Chicken breast, Salt, and Pepper.

directions.step: Season the chicken on both sides with the salt and pepper; place in slow cooker
Mix the Italian dressing, garlic, ranch dressing mix, chili powder, cumin, and kosher salt together and pour over chicken
Cook on low for about 5 hours or until chicken is done
Shred with fork and serve in salads, burritos, tacos, or anything else you like

name: Chicken Cacciatore
description: A delicious Chicken Cacciatore recipe featuring Chicken breast, Chunky vegetable-style spaghetti sauce, and Zucchini.

directions.step: Place all ingredients (except garnish) in a resealable gallon-sized freezer bag and mix together
When ready to eat, remove from freezer and thaw in fridge for 24 hours
Cook on low for 6-8 hours
Serve with cooked spaghetti noodles and garnish with olives and cheese

name: Chicken Chili
description: A delicious Chicken Chili recipe featuring Chicken breast, Chili season, and Rotel.

directions.step: In a crockpot, mix chili season, rotel, and tomato sauce
Add chicken
Cook on low for 8 hours
Shred chicken with a fork; if it has cooked long enough it will just fall apart
Add remaining ingredients
Cook 30 minutes to warm
Serve with shredded cheese, sour cream, Frito's or cornbread

name: Chicken Stew
description: A delicious Chicken Stew recipe featuring Potato, Baby carrots, and Chicken thighs.

directions.step: Toss potatoes and carrots in crockpot
Arrange chicken on top
Sprinkle onion and garlic powder over chicken
Pour gravy and 1/2 cup water over all
Cook 8-10 hours on low

name: Chicken with Carrots and Potatoes
description: A delicious Chicken with Carrots and Potatoes recipe featuring Onion, Cooking spray, and Baby carrots.

directions.step: Place onion in a 6-quart electric slow cooker coated with cooking spray; top with carrots and potatoes
Combine broth, white wine, thyme, garlic, 1/2 teaspoon of salt, and 1/4 teaspoon of pepper
Pour over vegetables
Combine paprika, remaining 1/4 teaspoon salt, and remaining 1/4 teaspoon pepper; rub over chicken
Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat
Add oil to pan; swirl to coat
Add chicken
Cook 3 minutes on each side or until browned
Arrange chicken on top of vegetables
Cover and cook on low for 3 1/2 hours or until chicken is done and vegetables are tender
Garnish with additional thyme

name: Cowboy Chicken
description: A delicious Cowboy Chicken recipe featuring Chicken breast, Brown sugar, and Dijon mustard.

directions.step: Cook on high for 4 hours, or low for 6-8
Last 30 minutes or so add sour cream and a can of corns or beans
Shred chicken before serving
Serve over brown rice and top with sour cream, cheese, extra salsa, etc.

name: Crockpot Balsamic Chicken
description: A delicious Crockpot Balsamic Chicken recipe featuring Garlic powder, Dried basil, and Salt.

directions.step: Combine garlic powder, dried basil, salt, pepper, and dried minced onion in a small bowl and spread over chicken on both sides
Set aside
Pour olive oil and garlic on the bottom of the crockpot
Place chicken on top
Pour balsamic vinegar over the chicken
Cover and cook on high for 4 hours
Sprinkle with fresh parsley on top to serve

name: Crockpot Black Beans and Rice
description: A delicious Crockpot Black Beans and Rice recipe featuring Black beans, Rice, and Salsa.

directions.step: Spray the inside of a 4 quart slow cooker with non stick spray
Stir together black beans, rice, 1 1/2 cups water, salsa, cumin, chili powder, garlic powder, salt, and pepper
Cover and cook on low for 3 hours
Remove lid and stir well
Add additional salt and pepper to taste
Serve with additional toppings

name: Crockpot Cheesy Chicken Spaghetti
description: A delicious Crockpot Cheesy Chicken Spaghetti recipe featuring Spaghetti, Velveeta light cheese, and Rotisserie chicken.

directions.step: Saute onion and pepper until tender
Spray slow cooker with non-stick cooking spray
Combine all ingredients
Cook on low for 2-3 hours

name: Crockpot Chicken Chili
description: A delicious Crockpot Chicken Chili recipe featuring Chicken breast, Chunky salsa, and Diced tomatoes with chilis.

directions.step: Place chicken in the bottom of a crockpot
Add remaining ingredients on top, stir to combine
Cover and cook on high 4 hours or low 6-8 hours, or until chicken is done
Shred chicken and stir to combine before serving

name: Crockpot Macaroni and Cheese
description: A delicious Crockpot Macaroni and Cheese recipe featuring Elbow macaroni, Shredded cheddar cheese, and Whole milk.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients except 1/2 cup of cheese in slow cooker
Cover and cook on low for 5 hours
Sprinkle remaining cheese on top and enjoy

name: Crockpot Mexican Chicken Chili
description: A delicious Crockpot Mexican Chicken Chili recipe featuring Shredded rotisserie chicken or shredded chicken breast, Black beans, and Pinto beans.

ingredients.name: Shredded rotisserie chicken or shredded chicken breast

directions.step: Combine ingredients in crockpot and cook for 7-8 hours on low

name: Crockpot Sesame Chicken
description: A delicious Crockpot Sesame Chicken recipe featuring Chicken breast, Honey, and Soy sauce.

directions.step: Put chicken into crockpot
Combine honey, soy sauce, onion, ketchup, oil, and garlic
Pour over chicken
Cook 3-4 hours on low or 1.5-2.5 hours on high, or just until chicken is cooked through
Remove chicken from crockpot, leave sauce
Dissolve cornstarch in 3 tablespoons of water and pour into crockpot
Stir to combine with sauce
Replace lid and cook sauce on high for 10 more minutes or until slightly thickened
Cut chicken into bite-sized pieces and return to crockpot; can leave chicken in to simmer on low or serve
Sprinkle with sesame seeds and serve over rice

name: Crockpot Mexican Pork Roast
description: A delicious Crockpot Mexican Pork Roast recipe featuring Pork roast, Onion, and Garlic.

directions.step: Add everything to crockpot with 1 cup of water and cook 3-4 hours on high or 6-8 hours on low
Before serving, use two forks to pull the meat apart

name: Crockpot Texas Calico Chili
description: A delicious Crockpot Texas Calico Chili recipe featuring Stew beef, Onion, and Tomato paste.

directions.step: Combine all ingredients in a 4-5 quart crockpot; stir well
Cover and cook on low for 8-10 hours
Serve with cornbread

name: Crockpot Ugly Chicken Dinner
description: A delicious Crockpot Ugly Chicken Dinner recipe featuring Sweet potato, Onion, and Chicken.

ingredients.name: Sweet potato
ingredients.prep: Medium peeled and thickly slice (~1/2 inch)

directions.step: Grease crockpot
Lay potatoes in bottom
Place chicken on top
Cover with onions, carrots, and pepper
Sprinkle each layer with salt and pepper
Slice butter into pieces and lay on top of everything
Sprinkle with garlic powder
Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours or until potatoes are tender

name: Crockpot Whole Baked Chicken
description: A delicious Crockpot Whole Baked Chicken recipe featuring Whole chicken, Sea salt, and Pepper.

directions.step: Wad up two pieces of foil or parchment paper and make them flat on top
Place in 5-quart (or larger) crockpot and pour 1/2 inch of water in the bottom
Rinse and dry the whole chicken
In a small bowl, combine the spices
Rub into the chicken
Place chicken on top of foil balls
Cook on high for 2 hours
After 2 hours, switch to low and cook for 5 hours
Test for 165 degrees with a thermometer

name: Easy Crockpot Ribs
description: A delicious Easy Crockpot Ribs recipe featuring Ribs, Garlic powder, and Onion powder.

directions.step: Combine garlic powder, onion powder, chili powder, and 1 teaspoon of salt; rub into meat
Lay ribs in the bottom of a 5-6 quart greased crockpot; layer if necessary
Combine sucanat (or brown sugar), ketchup, 1/4 cup water, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, paprika, salt, and pepper; whisk to combine
Pour over meat
Cover and cook on low for 8 hours until meat has a temperature of 170 degrees
Remove meat from crockpot and keep warm
Skim grease from sauce if desired
Combine cornstarch and 4 tablespoons of water; stir into juices
Cover and cook on high for 30 minutes or until thickened
Serve sauce over meat

name: Easy Roast Beef
description: A delicious Easy Roast Beef recipe featuring Roast, Coca Cola, Lipton's onion soup mix.

directions.step: Put roast in crockpot, then onion soup mix, and then pour the coke over it
Cook on low around 8 hours
Add carrots and potatoes 3-4 hours before dinner

name: Family Favorite Chili
description: A delicious Family Favorite Chili recipe featuring Ground beef, Onion, and Garlic.

directions.step: Cook beef until brown, drain
Mix beef and remaining ingredients except beans in slow cooker
Cover and cook on low setting for 6-8 hours
Stir in beans
Cover and cook 15-20 minutes longer

name: Greek Chicken
description: A delicious Greek Chicken recipe featuring Red potatoes, Chicken pieces, and Onion.

ingredients.name: Chicken pieces
ingredients.prep: Quarters work best any will do

directions.step: Peel the potatoes if desired; chop them into quarters and place in the bottom of the crockpot
Place the chicken pieces on top of the potatoes
Sprinkle the chicken with onion, garlic, and seasonings
Drizzle all with olive oil
Cook on high for 4 hours or low 6-8 hours

name: Honey Glazed Chicken Thighs
description: A delicious Honey Glazed Chicken Thighs recipe featuring Kosher salt, Black pepper, and Red pepper flakes.

directions.step: ---------- NORMAL DIRECTIONS ----------
Mix salt, pepper, red pepper flakes, chili powder, paprika, and garlic powder together and set aside
Mix honey and cider vinegar and set aside
Un-tuck chicken thighs so they are flat
Cover both sides in seasoning and place chicken in slow cooker
Pour honey mixture over chicken
Cook on low for 6-8 hours or on high for 3-4 hours
If you are able to baste the chicken by spooning some of the liquid over the chicken periodically during the cooking time, please do
Take chicken out of slow cooker and let rest for a few minutes
Spoon excess glaze over chicken before serving
---------- FREEZING DIRECTIONS ----------
Perform steps 2-6; In step 5 divide chicken among freezer bags instead of placing in crockpot
Remove as much air as possible; freeze
---------- SERVING DAY DIRECTIONS ----------
Perform steps 7-10

name: Pasta Fagioli in the Crockpot
description: A delicious Pasta Fagioli in the Crockpot recipe featuring Ground beef, Onion, and Carrots.

directions.step: Brown beef in a skillet
Drain fat from beef and add to crockpot with everything except pasta
Cook on high for 4-5 hours or low for 7-8 hours
Add pasta in the last 30 minutes
Serve with a nice crisp green and some garlic bread

name: Sausage and Black Eyed Peas
description: A delicious Sausage and Black Eyed Peas recipe featuring Polish or kielbasa sausage, Rotel tomatoes, and Green chilies.

directions.step: Place sausage in crockpot
Add tomatoes and chilies
Cook on low for 6-8 hours
30 minutes before serving, add black eyed peas and let simmer
Serve over rice or cornbread

name: Slow Cooker Honey-Dijon Ham
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Honey-Dijon Ham recipe featuring Ham, Apple juice, and Brown sugar.

directions.step: In a 4-6 quart slow cooker, place ham
Add apple juice
In a small bowl, mix brown sugar, honey, and mustard
Spread mixture over ham
Cover; cook on low for 6-8 hours
Remove ham from slow cooker, cut into slices, place on serving platter

name: Steak Fajitas
description: A delicious Steak Fajitas recipe featuring Flank or skirt steak, Bell peppers, and Onion.

directions.step: Combine all ingredients in crockpot
Cook all day on low, or on high for about 3.5 hours
Serve inside tortillas with all your favorite Mexican fixings

name: Vegetable Beef Stew
description: A delicious Vegetable Beef Stew recipe featuring Baby carrots, Potatoes, and Celery.

directions.step: Layer carrots, potatoes, and celery in slow cooker
Place stew seasoning in plastic bag
Add beef; toss to coat
Add beef to cooker; sprinkle with any remaining seasoning
Pour in 1 cup of water
Layer corn and green beens on top
Cover and cook on low 8-10 hours or until beef is tender

name: Slow Cooker Parmesan Honey Pork Roast
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Parmesan Honey Pork Roast recipe featuring Pork roast, Parmesan cheese, and Honey.

directions.step: Spray slow cooker with non-stick cooking spray
Place roast in slow cooker
In bowl, combine cheese, honey, soy sauce, basil, garlic, oil, and salt; pour over pork
Cover and cook on low for 6-7 hours or until a meat thermometer reads 160 degrees
Remove pork to a serving platter; keep warm
Skim fat from cooking juices; transfer to a small saucepan
Bring liquid to a boil
Combine cornstarch and 1/4 of cold water until smooth
Gradually stir into pan
Bring to a boil; cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened

name: Slow Cooker Easy Pepper Steak
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Easy Pepper Steak recipe featuring Round steak, Green bell pepper, and Red bell pepper.

directions.step: Cut round steak, peppers, and onions into strips
Sear steak in pan over medium-high heat
Press clove of garlic into crockpot, add all ingredients
Cover; cook on low for 8-10 hours
Serve; add rice if wanted

name: Pulled Caesar Chicken Sandwiches
description: A delicious Pulled Caesar Chicken Sandwiches recipe featuring Chicken breast, Salt, and Pepper.

directions.step: Place chicken breasts in crockpot with a little water, salt, and pepper
Cook 6-8 hours on low
30 minutes before eating, shred chicken with 2 forks, pour in a bottle of Caesar dressing and let cook for 30 minutes
Serve warm with lettuce on your favorite bun

name: Slow Cooker Balsamic Chicken with Olives
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Balsamic Chicken with Olives recipe featuring Chicken breast, Diced tomatoes, and Tomato sauce.

directions.step: Pour the olive oil into the bottom of the slow cooker
Place the chicken breasts into the slow cooker
Season with salt and pepper
Top each breast with sliced onion, garlic cloves, and Italian herbs
Pour in vinegar, tomatoes, and tomato sauce
Cook on high for about 4 hours
Remove chicken breasts, slice on the bias, and place back in the tomato/vinegar sauce
Add olives and let them warm through for about 10 minutes
Serve over whole wheat spaghetti, polenta, or your carb of choice
Sprinkle with grated parmesan or a little crumbled light feta

name: Salsa and Black Bean Chicken
description: A delicious Salsa and Black Bean Chicken recipe featuring Chicken, Salsa, and Black beans.

directions.step: Place boneless skinless chicken breasts in crockpot
Pour salsa over the top and add black beans
Let it slow cook all day and then serve over rice
Add extra can of beans and medium salsa for more flavor

name: Slow Cooker Buffalo Chicken Sandwiches
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Buffalo Chicken Sandwiches recipe featuring Chicken breast halves, Buffalo wing sauce, and Dry ranch salad dressing mix.

directions.step: Place the chicken breasts into a slow cooker and pour 3/4 of the wing sauce and the ranch dressing mix
Cover; cook on low for 6-7 hours
Once the chicken has cooked, add the butter, and shred the meat finely with two forks
Place the meat onto the hoagie rolls, and splash with the remaining buffalo wing sauce to server
Serve with slaw cabbage combined with blue cheese dressing

name: Slow Cooker Mexican Pork Burrito Bowls
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Mexican Pork Burrito Bowls recipe featuring Sweet onion, Taco seasoning mix, and Pork shoulder.

ingredients.name: Hot cooked white or brown rice

directions.step: Spray 5-quart slow cooker with cooking spray
Place onion in cooker
Sprinkle taco seasoning mix over pork shoulder, pressing to coat
Place pork in cooker
Top with enchilada sauce
Cover; cook on high heat setting for 5-6 hours or until tender
Remove pork from slow cooker; shred meat with fork, discarding fat
Place shredded pork in large bowl
Strain sauce
Add chiles, salt, and 1 cup of the strained sauce; stir well
Spoon about 3/4 cup rice into each of 8 individual served bowls
Top each with about 1/2 cup pork mixture and 1/4 cup lettuce
Garnish with salsa, cheese, and/or cilantro

name: Shredded Beef for Burritos
description: A delicious Shredded Beef for Burritos recipe featuring Roast, Garlic powder, and Salt.

directions.step: Brown on each side a roast that has been seasoned with garlic powder, salt, and pepper in frying pan with oil
Put roast in crockpot and add green enchilada sauce, rotel tomatoes, and Serrano peppers
Cook on high for about 6 hours
The meat can be shredded with a fork
Serve with flour tortillas, sour cream, guacamole, lettuce, tomatoes, onions, cheese, cilantro, lime, hot sauce - anything you like on your burritos

name: Spicy Chicken Stew
description: A delicious Spicy Chicken Stew recipe featuring Baking potatoes, Frozen whole-kernal corn, and Celery.

directions.step: Place first 6 ingredients in an electric slow cooker
Stir in salsa, cumin, chili powder, and black pepper
Place chicken on top of vegetables and add broth
Cover and cook on high for 4 hours
Remove chicken from slow cooker; shred with 2 forks
Return chicken to slow cooker
Stir tortilla strips into stew
Garnish with parsley

name: White Chicken Chili
description: A delicious White Chicken Chili recipe featuring Olive oil, Onion, and Chopped green chiles.

directions.step: In a large skillet, cook onion in oil for 4 minutes or until transparent
Add chiles, flour, and cumin; cook and stir for 2 minutes
Spray crockpot with cooking spray; put mixture into crockpot
Add beans, chicken broth, and chicken
Cook on low for 3-4 hours
Garnish with cheese, sour cream, and salsa
Serve with tortilla chips or warm corn tortillas

name: Sweet Balsamic Glazed Pork Loin
description: A delicious Sweet Balsamic Glazed Pork Loin recipe featuring Pork loin roast, Ground sage, and Salt.

directions.step: In a small bowl, combine the sage, salt, pepper, and garlic
Rub the spices all over the roast
Place the pork roast in the slow cooker and pour in a 1/2 cup of water
Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours
Near the end of the cooking time for the roast, combine the ingredients for the glaze in a small saucepan with 1/2 cup of water
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce and let the mixture simmer, stirring occasionally, until it thickens
Remove the pork from the slow cooker, shred and place on a platter or plate
Drizzle the glaze over the pork and serve

name: Jambalaya
description: A delicious Jambalaya recipe featuring Onion, Green pepper, and Celery.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients except shrimp and rice
Cover and cook on low for 7-8 hours
Stir in shrimp
Cover and cook for 1 hour
Serve with rice

name: Sweet Hawaiian Crockpot Chicken
description: A delicious Sweet Hawaiian Crockpot Chicken recipe featuring Chicken tenderloin chunks, Pineapple juice, and Brown sugar.

directions.step: Combine all ingredients in crockpot
Cook on low for 6-8 hours

name: Teriyaki Chicken Thighs
description: A delicious Teriyaki Chicken Thighs recipe featuring Chicken thigh, Sugar, and Soy sauce.

directions.step: Place chicken in a 4 quart slow cooker
Combine the sugar, soy sauce, vinegar, ginger, garlic, and pepper; pour over chicken
Cover and cook on low for 4-5 hours or until chicken is tender
Remove chicken to a serving platter; keep warm
Skin fat from cooking juices; transfer to a small saucepan
Bring liquid to a boil
Combine cornstarch and 4 1/2 tsp of water until smooth
Gradually stir into the pan
Bring to a boil; cook and stir for 2 minutes or until thickened
Serve with rice

name: Slow Cooker Chili Chicken Chowder
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Chili Chicken Chowder recipe featuring Chicken tenders, Frozen hash brown potatoes, and Progresso chicken broth.

directions.step: In slow cooker, stir together all ingredients except half and half until combined
Cover and cook on high for 4-5 hours
Stir in half and half
Spoon into bowls

name: Slow Cooker Lasagna
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Lasagna recipe featuring Lean ground beef, Tomato pasta sauce, and Tomato sauce.

directions.step: Brown ground beef in large skillet over medium-high heat until thoroughly cooked, stirring frequently; drain
Spray 4-5 quart slow cooker with nonstick cooking spray
Spread 3/4 cup of the tomato pasta sauce in bottom of sprayed slow cooker
Stir remaining tomato pasta sauce and tomato sauce into ground beef
Layer 3 lasagna noodles over sauce in slow cooker, breaking noodles as necessary
top with 1/3 of the Alfredo pasta sauce, spreading evenly
Sprinkle with 1 cup of the mozzarella cheese
Top with 1/3 of the ground beef mixture, spreading evenly
Repeat layering twice, using 2 lasagna noodles in last layer
Sprinkle parmesan cheese over top
Cover; cook on low setting for 3.5 - 4.5 hours
If desired, cut into wedges and serve

name: Ranch Chicken Enchilada Casserole
description: A delicious Ranch Chicken Enchilada Casserole recipe featuring Chicken breast, Taco seasoning, and Ranch dressing mix.

directions.step: Place chicken in slow cooker and sprinkle seasoning mixes over top
Cover and cook on high for 4 hours or low for 8 hours
Shred chicken with two forks and stir to evenly distribute juices and seasonings
In the bottom of a 9x13" baking pan, cover the bottom with two tortillas
Spread half of shredded chicken on tortillas, then 1/2 cup ranch dressing drizzled, and top with 1 cup shredded cheese
Repeat layers once more
Bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes or until cheese is melted and lasagna is heated through
Serve with additional ranch dressing

name: Slow Cooker Italian Sausages and Peppers with Rotini
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Italian Sausages and Peppers with Rotini recipe featuring Turkey Italian sausages, Sweet onion, and Garlic.

directions.step: Spray 3-4 quart slow cooker with cooking spray
In cooker, mix all ingredients except pasta and cheese
Cover; cook on low heat setting for 6-8 hours
Cook and drain pasta as directed on package
Serve sausage mixture over pasta; sprinkle with parmesan cheese

name: Slow Cooker Minestrone Stew
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Minestrone Stew recipe featuring Sweet Italian turkey sausage links, Diced tomatoes, and Garden vegetable soup.

directions.step: In 12" skillet, cook sausage over medium heat 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally until no longer pink; drain
Spray 3-4 quart slow cooker with cooking spray
In slow cooker, mix sausage and all remaining ingredients except macaroni and cheese
Cover; cook on low for 6 hours
Stir macaroni into slow cooker
Increase to high
Cover; cook about 20 minutes longer until macaroni is tender
Sprinkle with cheese

name: Slow Cooker Pasta with Pork Ragu
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Pasta with Pork Ragu recipe featuring Carrot, Onion, and Garlic.

directions.step: In a 4-6 quart slow cooker, combine the carrot, onion, garlic, tomato paste, thyme, oregano, salt, and pepper
Add the tomatoes (and the juices); add the pork and turn to coat
Cover; cook on low for 7-8 hours or on high for 5-6 hours (or until pork is very tender)
20 minutes before serving, cook the fettuccini according to the directions on the package; drain and return to pot
Meanwhile, using 2 forks, shred the pork and mix it into the cooking liquid
Toss the pasta with the Ragu and sprinkle with parmesan

name: Slow Cooked Taco Casserole
description: A delicious Slow Cooked Taco Casserole recipe featuring Ground beef sirloin, Onion, and Garlic.

directions.step: Brush inside of 3.5 or 4 quart slow cooker with oil or spray with nonstick cooking spray
In large skillet, brown beef sirloin with onion and garlic over medium-high heat for 8-10 minutes or until thoroughly cooked, stirring frequently
Drain, stir in taco seasoning mix, salt, and pepper
Place 3 tortillas in bottom of oiled slow cooker
Top with beef mixture, broth, tomato sauce, and enchilada sauce
Sprinkle with 1/2 cup of the cheese
Layer 3 more tortillas
Top with beans, corn, green chiles, half of the olives, and 1/2 cup cheese
Top with remaining 3 tortillas
Sprinkle with remaining 1/2 cup cheese and olives
Cook on high for 2.5-3 hours or on low for 6-7 hours
Uncover slow cooker for last 30 minutes of cooking time
Top individual servings with sour cream

name: Smothered Pork Chops
description: A delicious Smothered Pork Chops recipe featuring Flour, Ground mustard, and Garlic pepper blend.

directions.step: In a large resealable bag, combine 1/2 cup flour, mustard, pepper blend, and seasoned salt
Add chops one at a time and shake to coat
In a large skillet, brown meat in oil on each side
Transfer to slow cooker
Place remaining flour in a small bowl; whisk in broth until smooth
Pour over chops
Cover and cook on low for 3-3.5 hours or until meat is tender
Remove pork to a serving plate and keep warm
Whisk pan juices until smooth, serve with pork

name: Turkey Sausage and Red Bean Stew
description: A delicious Turkey Sausage and Red Bean Stew recipe featuring Turkey sausage, Cooked red beans OR small red beans, and Brown rice.

ingredients.name: Cooked red beans OR small red beans

directions.step: Combine all ingredients in slow cooker with 1 cup of water
Cook on low setting for 6 hours

name: Chocolate Crispies
description: A delicious Chocolate Crispies recipe featuring Flour, Baking powder, and Baking soda.

directions.step: In a large bowl, combine: margarine, brown sugar, sugar, and egg
Beat until creamy
Blend in baking chocolate
Add remaining ingredients
Drop rounded tablespoon onto greased cookie sheet
Bake at 350 for 10-12 minutes

name: Chocolate Mint Cookies
description: A delicious Chocolate Mint Cookies recipe featuring Margarine, Brown sugar, and Semi-sweet chocolate chips.

directions.step: In a large saucepan over low heat, cook margarine, sugar, and 2 tablespoons of water until butter is melted
Add chocolate chips and stir until partially melted
Remove from heat and continue to stir until chocolate is completely melted
Pour into a large bowl and let stand for 10 minutes to cool slightly
Beat in one egg at a time, slowly add dry ingredients
Chill dough at least one hour for easier handling
Line cookie sheets with foil
Bake 12-13 minutes at 350 degrees
Remove from oven and immediately place mint on hot cookie

name: Cream Cheese Chocolate Chip Cookies
description: A delicious Cream Cheese Chocolate Chip Cookies recipe featuring Unsalted butter, Cream cheese, and Light brown sugar.

directions.step: Using a mixmaster, combine the butter, cream cheese, sugars, egg, vanilla, and beat on medium-high speed until well creamed, light, and fluffy; about 5 minutes
Stop, scrape down the sides of the bowl and add flour, cornstarch, baking soda, optional salt, and mix until just combined; about 1 minute
Add chocolate chips or chunks and beat momentarily to incorporate, or fold by hand
Form 2" rounds and place mounds on a large plate or baking sheet

Flatten mounds slightly with your palm, cover with plastic wrap, and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or up to 5 days, before baking; Do not bake with warm dough because cookies will spread and bake thinner and flatter
Preheat oven to 350 degrees, line a baking sheet with parchment paper and place mounds on baking sheet, spaced at least 2 inches apart
Bake for 8-9 minutes, or until edges have set and tops are just beginning to set
Do not bake longer than 10 minutes as cookies will firm up as they cool
Allow cookies to cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before removing and transferring to rack to finish cooling

name: No Name Bars
description: A delicious No Name Bars recipe featuring Graham crackers, Sugar, and Margarine.

directions.step: Melt margarine, mix with graham cracker crumbs and sugar
Spread on bottom of 9x13x2 pan
Layer chocolate chips, coconut, nuts
Pour sweetened condensed milk over top
Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes

name: Candy Cane Desserts
description: A delicious Candy Cane Desserts recipe featuring Shortening, Margarine, and Egg.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients except food coloring
Divide batter
Mix red food coloring in 1/2 of the batter
Roll dough into two long tubes
Twist and shape to look like candy canes
Sprinkle with sugar
Bake at 375 degrees for 9-12 minutes

name: M&M Cookies
description: A delicious M&M Cookies recipe featuring Brown sugar, Margarine, and Vanilla.

directions.step: Mix brown sugar, margarine, vanilla, and eggs in large bowl until well blended
Stir in remaining ingredients
Bake until brown at 350 for 10-12 minutes

name: Raspberry Squares
description: A delicious Raspberry Squares recipe featuring Sugar, Flour, and Shredded coconut.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients except preserves with hands until crumbly
Press 3/4 of the mix into greased 13x9 pan
Spread medium size jar of raspberry preserves over entire crust, then drop remaining batter by spoonful over the top
Bake at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes

name: Chocolate and PB Marshmallow Squares
description: A delicious Chocolate and PB Marshmallow Squares recipe featuring Refrigerated crescent dinner rolls, Creamy peanut butter, and Brown sugar.

directions.step: Heat oven to 375 degrees
Line cookie sheet with parchment paper
Unroll dough; separate into 2 rectangles
Place 1 rectangle on cookie sheet; press perforations to seal
In small bowl, mix peanut butter and brown sugar
Spread over dough to within 1/4 inch of edges
Press marshmallows into peanut butter mixture; top with candy bars and remaining dough rectangle
Press edges and perforations to seal
Brush top with egg white; sprinkle with granulated sugar
Bake 15-20 minutes or until deep golden brown
Cool 10 minutes; serve warm or cool

name: Crescent Layer Bars
description: A delicious Crescent Layer Bars recipe featuring Refrigerated crescent dinner rolls, White vanilla baking chips, and Semisweet chocolate chips.

directions.step: Heat oven to 375 degrees (350 degrees for darker pans)
Grease bottom and sides of 13x9 inch pan
Unroll dough into 2 long rectangles
Place in pan; press over bottom and 1/2 inch up sides to form crust
Bake 5 minutes
Remove partially baked crust from oven
Sprinkle vanilla chips, chocolate chips, almonds, and cashews evenly over crust
Pour condensed milk evenly over top
Return to oven; bake 20-25 minutes longer or until golden brown
Cool 10 minutes
Run knife around sides of pan
Cool 1 hour
Refrigerate about 30 minutes or until chocolate is set
For bars, cut into 9 rows by 4 rows

name: Peanut Butter Crunch Layer Brown
description: A delicious Peanut Butter Crunch Layer Brown recipe featuring Refrigerated peanut butter cookie dough, Toffee bits, and Peanut butter baking chips.

directions.step: Heat oven to 350 degrees
Spray 13x9 inch pan (dark pan not recommended) with cooking spray
In a large bowl, break up 1.5 rolls of cookie dough (refrigerate 1/2 roll of cookie dough for another use)
Add toffee bits, peanut butter chips, 1/2 cup of the nut topping and vanilla
Mix with wooden spoon or knead with hands until well blended
Press evenly in bottom of pan
Bake for 18-24 minutes or until golden brown
Remove from oven to cooling rack
Cool completely; about 1 hour
In a large microwaveable bowl, microwave chocolate chips and butterscotch chips on high for 2-2.5 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds until smooth
Stir in peanut butter until smooth
Spread over cooled bars
Sprinkle with remaining 1 1/4 cups nut topping; press in lightly
Refrigerate 30 minutes until firm
For bars, cut into 6 rows by 6 rows
Store covered

name: Oatmeal Cookies
description: A delicious Oatmeal Cookies recipe featuring Margarine, Brown sugar, and Sugar.

directions.step: Beat together margarine and sugar until light and fluffy
Beat in egg and vanilla
Add dry ingredients, mixing well
Stir in oats
Drop by rounded tablespoons onto ungreased cookie sheets
Bake at 375 degrees for 8-9 minutes

name: Snickerdoodles
description: A delicious Snickerdoodles recipe featuring Margarine, Shortening, and Egg.

directions.step: Mix 1 1/2 cup sugar, margarine, shortening, and eggs in a large bowl
Stir in flour, cream of tartar, and baking soda
Shape dough into small balls
Mix 3 tablespoons of sugar and cinnamon together; roll balls into mixture
Cook on ungreased cookie sheet
Bake at 400 degrees for 8-10 minutes

name: Orange Chicken
description: A delicious Orange Chicken recipe featuring Barbecue Sauce, Orange Marmelade, and Soy Sauce.

directions.step: Cook popcorn chicken according to package
Combine remaining ingredients in a saucepan and bring to a boil
Add chicken and serve with rice

name: Sweet & Sour Chicken
description: A delicious Sweet & Sour Chicken recipe featuring Pineapple chunks, Sugar, and Cornstarch.

ingredients.name: Have also used frozen popcorn chicken

directions.step: Pour over chicke and bake for 1/2 hour
Add pineapple chunks, green pepper and cherries, book another 1/2 hour
