Serve with rice or fried rice
Flour chicken and cook in a frying pan until brown, then put in a 9 x 13 pan
Combine sugar, cornstarch, vinegar, soy sauce, ginger and bullion in a sauce pan
Use the juice from the pineapple and add enough wter to make 1 1/2 cups of liquid
Stir continuously and bring to a boil for one minute

name: Crack Butterscotch Cookies
description: No Cook - Dave's recipe

directions.step: Melt butterscotch chips and peanut butter in a double boiler (or a pan over a pan of water!)
Pour over corn flakes and mix well
Use a tablespoon and scoop cookies onto wax paper and let cool

name: Fried Rice
description: A delicious Fried Rice recipe featuring Spam or barbeque pork, Pork chops, and Scallions.

directions.step: Cook rice and set aside - should have 3 cups of cooked rice
Scramble eggs with a little water. Cook in a fry pan (like a thin crepe).  Should have at least 4 crepes when done. Slice in strips
Add all the ingredients to the rice, mix well.
Put in a kettle with a little oil on the bottom and heat slowly. Add soysauce to taste
** We have eliminated the porkchops and used just barbeque pork - just double the amount)

name: Bean Dip
description: A delicious Bean Dip recipe featuring Hamburg, Green Chili Salsa, and Refried Beans.

directions.step: Brown hamburg with onion, garlic, salt & pepper
Add to refried beans
Add green chili salsa
put in crock pot and cook on low until bubbling
Add grated cheese to the top, to melt
Serve with chips

name: Spagetti Chop Chop
description: A delicious Spagetti Chop Chop recipe featuring Ground Beef, Spagetti, and Cream of mushroom soup.

ingredients.name: **Alternate
ingredients.prep: ** I use can of bean sprouts

directions.step: Preheat oven to 350
Sprinkle cheese on top and bake for 30 minutes
Brown ground beef, onion and green pepper
Add mushroom soup and all remaining ingredients (except cheese)
Mix well and pour into a casserole dish.

name: Sugar Cookies
description: A delicious Sugar Cookies recipe featuring Flour, Baking powder, and Butter.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients
Chill thoroughly before rolling
Bake at 350 for 10-12 minutes

name: Chocolate Chex Mix
description: A delicious Chocolate Chex Mix recipe featuring Crispy corn cereal squares, Small pretzels, and Dry roasted peanuts.

directions.step: Coat 13x9 baking pan with cooking spray
Combine cereal, pretzels, peanuts, and caramels in a large bowl
Microwave morsels on medium high for 1 minutes, stir and continue to microwave in 20 second intervals until melted
Pour over cereal mixture and stir to coat
Spread mixture onto baking pan and cool for 45 minutes or longer to dry
Break into bite sized pieces

name: Foolproof Chocolate Fudge
description: A delicious Foolproof Chocolate Fudge recipe featuring Semi-sweet morsels, Sweetened condensed milk, Vanilla.

directions.step: Over low heat, melt chocolate with condensed milk
Stir in remaining ingredients
Spread evenly into waxed paper lined 8" pan
Chill 2-3 hours
Cut into squares

name: Congo Bars
description: A delicious Congo Bars recipe featuring Yellow cake mix, Egg, and Margarine.

directions.step: Combine cake with all other ingredients
Mix well then pour into greased 13x9" pan and bake at 350 degrees for 20-25 minutes

name: Creamy Double Decker Fudge
description: A delicious Creamy Double Decker Fudge recipe featuring Peanut butter chips, Sweetened condensed milk, and Vanilla.

directions.step: Line 8" square pan with foil
In small bowl, combine peanut butter chips and 2/3 condensed milk
Microwave 1 - 1.5 minutes, stirring after 1 minute until chips are melted and mixture is smooth when stirred
Stir in 1/2 tsp vanilla, spread evenly into prepared pan
Microwave remaining condensed milk and chocolate chips; repeat above procedure
Stir in 1/2 tsp vanilla, spread evenly on peanut butter layer
Cover and chill until firm
Cut into 1 inch squares
Cover and store in refrigerator

name: Hermits
description: A delicious Hermits recipe featuring Shortening, Sugar, and Molasses.

directions.step: Cream shortening and sugar
Add eggs and molasses; beat
Add raisins, dry ingredients; stir
Use 2 cookie sheets; divide dough into 4 parts
Form rolls and place on cookie sheet
Flatten with glass dipped in sugar
Bake at 350 degrees for 10-12 minutes

name: Fingerlings
description: A delicious Fingerlings recipe featuring Margarine, Confectionary sugar, and Flour.

directions.step: Combine all ingredients
Roll cookies to size of individual fingers, roll in sugar
Bake at 350 degrees for 12-15 minutes

name: Peanut Blossoms
description: A delicious Peanut Blossoms recipe featuring Flour, Baking soda, and Sugar.

directions.step: Combine all ingredients except Hershey kisses in a large bowl
Mix on lowest speed until dough forms
Shape dough into balls, roll balls into sugar, place on ungreased cookie sheet
Bake at 375 degrees for 10-12 minutes
Remove from oven and top with candy kiss; press down so cookie cracks

name: White Chocolate Party Mix
description: A delicious White Chocolate Party Mix recipe featuring Mini pretzels, Cheerios, and Corn chex.

directions.step: In a large bowl, combine first five ingredients
In a microwave safe bowl heat chips and oil on medium-high for 2 minutes, stirring once
Microwave on high for a few more seconds
Stir until smooth
Pour over cereal mixture and mix well
Spread onto three waxed paper lined baking sheets
Spread onto three waxed paper lined baking sheets; let cool
Break apart and store in airtight container

name: Lemon Crinkle Cookies
description: A delicious Lemon Crinkle Cookies recipe featuring Butter, Granulated sugar, and Vanilla extract.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Grease light colored baking sheets with nonstick cooking spray and set aside
In a large bowl, cream butter and sugar together until light and fluffy
Whip in vanilla, egg, lemon zest, and juice
Scrape sides and mix again
Stir in all dry ingredients slowly until just combined, excluding the powdered sugar
Scrape sides of bowl and mix again briefly
Pour powdered sugar onto a large plate
Roll a heaping teaspoon of dough onto a ball and roll in the powdered sugar
Place on baking sheet and repeat with remaining dough
Bake for 9-11 minutes or until bottoms begin to barely brown and cookies look matte (not melty or shiny)
Remove from oven and cool cookies about 3 minutes before transferring to a cooling rack. NOTE: If using non-stick darker baking tray, reduce baking time by about 2 minutes

name: Peanut Butter Cookie Dough Brownies
description: A delicious Peanut Butter Cookie Dough Brownies recipe featuring Fudge brownie mix, Butter, and Peanut butter.

directions.step: Cream together butter, peanut butter, sugar, and brown sugar in a stand mixer
Add in milk and vanilla, mixing well
Gradually add in the flour while the mixer is turned on low, scraping down the sides every few minutes
Spread cookie dough over cooled brownies
Sprinkle Reese's Pieces over the dough and press lightly to adhere
Refrigerate leftovers

name: Peanut Butter Candy Square
description: A delicious Peanut Butter Candy Square recipe featuring Chocolate chips, Peanut butter, and Graham crackers.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients together except the chocolate chips
Spread in pan and cover with melted chocolate chips
Refrigerate 25 minutes

name: Buckeye Brownie Desserts
description: A delicious Buckeye Brownie Desserts recipe featuring Brownie mix, Butter, and Cream cheese.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 350 degrees
Line baking sheet with parchment paper
In a medium bowl, combine brownie mix, butter, cream cheese, and egg
Stir until dough comes together; it will be very thick and sticky (I used my hands)
Form rounded tablespoon sized portions of dough into balls, placing on baking sheet about 2 inches apart, making an indentation with your thumb in the center of each
In another bowl, stir together peanut butter and powdered sugar
Form peanut butter into tablespoon sized balls and press into the indentations in the brownie cookies
Press peanut butter down slightly because the peanut butter won't spread and you don't want the cookies to be too tall
Bake for 10-12 minutes until edges are set
Transfer to wire rack to cool
When cooled, top each cookie with about a tablespoon of chocolate frosting

name: Shortbread Hearts
description: A delicious Shortbread Hearts recipe featuring Sweet butter, Confectionary sugar, and Flour.

directions.step: Cream butter and confectionary sugar together until light
Add flour and vanilla to mixture and blend thoroughly
Gather dough into a ball, wrap in wax paper, and chill 4-6 hours
Roll out chilled dough to 5/8 inch thickness
Using a heart shaped cookie cutter, cut out cookies
Sprinkle top with granulated sugar
Place cookies on ungreased cookie sheet and refrigerate 45 minutes before baking
Bake at 325 degrees for 20 minutes or until just starting to color lightly; cookies should not be brown at all

name: Swedish Butterball Cookies
description: A delicious Swedish Butterball Cookies recipe featuring Margarine, Powdered sugar, and Chopped nuts.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients
Make into small balls
Bake on ungreased cookie sheet (they do not get brown)
Bake at 325 degrees for 20-25 minutes
While the cookies are still hot, roll in powdered sugar

name: Vacuum Cleaner Bars
description: A delicious Vacuum Cleaner Bars recipe featuring Margarine, Yellow cake mix, and Eggs.

directions.step: Combine margarine, cake mix, and egg
Stir together until dry ingredients are moistened
Pat mixture into bottom of a well-greased 10x15 jelly roll pan (I used a cookie sheet and it worked just as well)
Beat 2 eggs lightly, then beat in cream cheese and powdered sugar
Stir in coconut and nuts
Pour over patted cake mixture, spreading evenly
Bake at 325 degrees for 45-50 minutes or until golden brown
Cool pan on wire rack to room temperature
Cut into bars

name: Chocolate Drops
description: A delicious Chocolate Drops recipe featuring Butter, Unsweetened chocolate, and Sugar.

directions.step: Melt chocolate and butter
Add sugar and vanilla
Add eggs and beat
Add remaining ingredients except confectionary sugar
Chill several hours
Form small balls and roll in confectionary sugar
Place on greased cookie sheet
Cook at 350 degrees for 12 minutes

name: Caramel Peanut Popcorn Squares
description: A delicious Caramel Peanut Popcorn Squares recipe featuring Refrigerated peanut butter cookies, Mini marshmallows, and Butter-flavored microwave popcorn.

directions.step: Heat oven to 350 degrees
Spray 13x9" pan with cooking spray
With floured fingers, press dough evenly in bottom of pan to form crust
Bake 14-16 minutes longer or until golden brown
Sprinkle marshmallows over crust
Bake 3 minutes longer or until marshmallows are puffed but not browned
Meanwhile, in a large bowl, mix popcorn and peanuts; set aside
In medium microwaveable bowl, microwave peanut butter chips, corn syrup, and butter uncovered on high 1-2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds until melted and smooth
Pour over popcorn mixture; stir to coat completely
Immediately press mixture over marshmallows in even layer using back of spoon
In small microwaveable bowl, microwave chocolate chips uncovered on high 1-1.5 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds until softened and chips can be stirred smooth
Drizzle melted chocolate over bars
Cool on cooling rack for 1 hour
Refrigerate 30 minutes or until set
Cut into 6 rows by 4 rows

name: Chocolate Chips, Oats, and Caramel Cookie Squares
description: A delicious Chocolate Chips, Oats, and Caramel Cookie Squares recipe featuring Refrigerated chocolate chip cookies, Quick-cooking oats, and Caramel ice cream topping.

directions.step: Heat oven to 350 degrees
In large bowl, break up cookie dough
Stir or knead in oats and salt
Reserve 1/2 cup dough for topping
In ungreased 9" square pan, press remaining dough mixture evenly in bottom to form crust
Bake 10-12 minutes or until dough puffs and appears dry
In small bowl, mix caramel topping, flour, and vanilla until well blended
Sprinkle walnuts and baking chips evenly over crust
Drizzle evenly with caramel mixture
Crumble reserved 1/2 cup dough mixture over caramel
Bake 20-25 minutes longer until golden brown
Cool 10 minutes
Run knife around sides of pan to loosen bars
Cool completely, about 1 hour 30 minutes
For bars, cut into 4 rows by 4 rows
Store tightly covered

name: Ham Kabobs
description: A delicious Ham Kabobs recipe featuring Unsweetened pineapple chunks, Margarine, and Brown sugar.

directions.step: In saucepan, combine juice, butter, brown sugar, and cinnamon; cook and stir until sugar is dissolved; set aside
Cook carrots until tender
Skewer meat and veggies
Brush with brown sugar mixture
Broil 4-6 minute each side or grill

name: Grilled Chicken and Pesto Farfalle
description: A delicious Grilled Chicken and Pesto Farfalle recipe featuring Chicken breast halves, Salt, and Cooking spray.

directions.step: Prepare grill to medium-high heat
Sprinkle chicken evenly with 1/4 tsp salt and 1/4 tsp pepper
Place chicken on grill rack coated with cooking spray; grill 10 minutes or until done, turning after 6 minutes
Remove from grill; let stand for 5 minutes
Cut chicken into 1/2 inch pieces; keep warm
Cook pasta according to package directions, omitting salt and fat
Drain in colander over a bowl, reserving 1/4 cup cooking liquid; place pasta in a large bowl
Heat butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat
Add garlic to pan; cook 1 minute, stirring occasionally
Combine 1/2 cup milk and flour in a small bowl, stirring with a whisk
Add milk mixture to pan, stirring constantly with a whisk
Stir in pesto
Gradually add remaining 1 cup milk and half-and-half, stirring constantly with whisk
Cook 8 minutes or until sauce thickens, stirring frequently
Add 1/4 cup reserved cooking liquid, remaining 3/4 tsp salt, remaining 1/2 tsp pepper, and 1 cup cheese; stir until cheese melts
Add chicken and sauce to pasta, tossing well to coat
Add tomatoes and basil; toss gently
Sprinkle with remaining 1 cup cheese
Serve immediately

name: Haddock Casserole
description: A delicious Haddock Casserole recipe featuring Haddock, Cream of shrimp soup, and Milk.

ingredients.name: Haddock
ingredients.prep: Boned and skinned cut into 1.5 inch chunks

directions.step: Place haddock in casserole
Mix soup and milk together in a small bowl; pour over fish
Sprinkle crackers on top of soup
Pour melted margarine on top

name: Deconstructed Burrito Pizza
description: A delicious Deconstructed Burrito Pizza recipe featuring Refridgerated thin pizza crust, Olive oil, and Garlic.

directions.step: Unroll pizza crust on a foil-lined cookie sheet and prebake at 400 degrees for ~7 minutes
Meanwhile, heat olive oil in a skillet; add onion and garlic
Saute a few minutes until onions are soft
Add black beans, cooked rice, cumin, and pepper. Cook on low for ~ 5 minutes, just to heat through
Spread salsa on prebaked crust, and add bean mixture and 1 cup of cheese
Top with corn and remaining cheese
Bake for an additional 8-11 minutes until the crust is browned and cheese is melted
Slice and serve!

name: Quesadilla Pie
description: A delicious Quesadilla Pie recipe featuring Green chiles, Black beans, and Taco sauce.

directions.step: Heat oven to 400
Spray 9-inch pie plate with cooking spray
In a medium bowl, mix chiles, beans, onions, tomato, 1/2 cup of taco sauce, jack cheese, and cheddar cheese
Set mixture aside
Spoon 1/4 cup taco sauce into pie plate
Top with 1 tortilla and 1/3 of the bean mixture
Repeat twice to make 3 layers
Top with the remaining tortilla
Cover loosely with foil
Bake 30 minutes
Uncover, sprinkle with remaining cheddar cheese
Bake 5-7 minutes longer or until cheese is melted

name: Southwest Kabobs
description: A delicious Southwest Kabobs recipe featuring Boneless pork chops, Taco or fajita seasoning, Green bell pepper.

directions.step: In plastic bag, toss together pork cubes with seasoning until evenly coated
Place on skewers and grill until brown

name: Skillet Tuna Cakes
description: A delicious Skillet Tuna Cakes recipe featuring Chunk light tuna in water, Stuffing mix for chicken, and Shredded milk cheddar cheese.

directions.step: Combine ingredients, refrigerate 10 minutes
Heat large nonstick skillet sprayed with cooking spray on medium heat
Use ice cream scoop to add 1/3 cup portions of tuna mixture in batches to skillet
Flatten into patties with back of spatula
Cook 6 minutes or until golden brown on both sides, carefully turning patties after 3 minutes

name: Macaroni and Cheese
description: A delicious Macaroni and Cheese recipe featuring Elbow macaroni, Butter, and Flour.

directions.step: Cook macaroni
In a large pan, melt the stick of butter, then add flour, milk, cheeses, and egg
Stir over medium to low heat until everything is melted into a nice cheese sauce
Add the macaroni and pour into baking pan
Mix crushed ritz crackers and 3 tablespoons of melted butter
Sprinkle on top of macaroni
Bake at 350 degrees for 30-45 minutes

name: Three Cheese Spaghetti Bake
description: A delicious Three Cheese Spaghetti Bake recipe featuring Spaghetti, Shredded mozzarella cheese, and Grated parmesan cheese.

directions.step: Cook spaghetti; drain
Add 1 cup mozzarella cheese, parmesan, romano, eggs, oil, and garlic powder
Press into a greased 13x9x2 baking dish
Top with spaghetti sauce
Cover and bake at 350 for 20 minutes
Uncover and sprinkle with remaining mozzarella
Bake 10 minutes longer

name: Parmesan Bake Fish Packets
description: A delicious Parmesan Bake Fish Packets recipe featuring 12x18 aluminum foil, Fish, and Mayonnaise.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 450 degrees or grill to medium-high
Spray foil with non-stick cooking spray
Center one fish fillet on each double layer of aluminum foil
Spread with mayo
Sprinkle with parmesan cheese and cayenne pepper
Top with veggies
Bring up sides of foil and double foil
Double fold ends to form packet, leaving room for heat circulation inside
Repeat to make 4 packets
Bake 18-22 minutes on cookie sheet in oven for grill 10-12 minutes in covered grill

name: Stromboli
description: A delicious Stromboli recipe featuring Refrigerated pizza dough, Deli mustard, and Deli meats and cheese.

directions.step: Unroll pizza dough on lightly floured board
Roll into 13x10 inch rectangle
Spread mustard evenly over dough
Layer deli meats on dough, overlapping slices, leaving one inch border around edges
Fold 1/3 of dough toward center from long edge of rectangle
Fold second side toward center enclosing filling
Pinch long edge to seal
Pinch ends together and tuck under dough
Place on greased baking dish
Cut shallow crosswise slits on top of dough spacing 3 inches apart
Brush stromboli lightly with beaten egg
Bake 15-18 minutes at 425 degrees

name: Pepperoni Pizza Bake
description: A delicious Pepperoni Pizza Bake recipe featuring Refrigerated biscuits, Pizza sauce, and Shredded mozzarella.

directions.step: Cut each biscuit into 8 pieces, toss with pizza sauce and 1 cup of cheese
Spread in layered 8" glass dish
Top with pepperoni and remaining 1 cup cheese
Bake at 375 degrees for 22-28 minutes

name: Pizza Crescent Bake
description: A delicious Pizza Crescent Bake recipe featuring Refrigerated crescent rolls, Beef, and Pizza sauce.

directions.step: Unroll one tube of dough and place it in a lightly greased 13x9x2 baking dish
Press to seal perforations
Cook beef; drain
Sprinkle over dough
Top with pizza sauce, sprinkle with cheese
Unroll second tube and place over cheese; seal perforations
Bake uncovered 350 degrees for 30 minutes

name: Pizza Cupcakes
description: A delicious Pizza Cupcakes recipe featuring Crescent rolls, Pizza sauce, and Mini pepperoni slices.

directions.step: Heat oven to 375 degrees
Spray regular size muffin cups with cooking spray
Unroll dough, separate into 8 triangles
Press into muffin cups
In a small bowl, mix sauce, pepperoni, sausage, and a 1/4 cup of cheese
Spoon about 2 tsp mixture into each dough lined cup
Sprinkle each with about 1 tsp additional cheese
Bake 16-18 minutes

name: Spaghetti Chop Chop
description: A delicious Spaghetti Chop Chop recipe featuring Hamburg, Spaghetti, and Chinese vegetables.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients together with 1/2 cup water and place in casserole dish
Bake at 375 degrees for 30 minutes

name: Lasagna
description: A delicious Lasagna recipe featuring Lasagna noodles, Spaghetti sauce, and Eggs.

directions.step: Mix beaten eggs, ricotta, parsley, and pepper
Cook lasagna noodles
Grease 13x9x2 inch pan
Layer noodles, cheese mixture, spaghetti sauce, and mozzarella
Sprinkle top with grated parmesan
Cook at 375 degrees for 30 minutes
Cool for 10 minutes

name: Ranch Pesto Rigatoni Bake
description: A delicious Ranch Pesto Rigatoni Bake recipe featuring Rigatoni, Ranch dressing, and Prepared pesto.

directions.step: Cook and drain rigatoni; return to pot
Stir in ranch dressing, pesto, diced tomatoes, and one cup shredded mozzarella
Transfer pasta to a 2 quart baking dish
Top with remaining mozzarella and parsley
Cover with foil and bake at 350 degrees for 15 minutes
Remove foil and bake an additional 5 minutes until cheese is completely melted

name: Spaghetti Pizza
description: A delicious Spaghetti Pizza recipe featuring Ground meat, Salt, and Oregano.

directions.step: Boil water and salt for spaghetti noodles; once it starts boiling, add noodles
Brown meat in a separate frying pan
Once noodles are cooked, drain and put in a casserole dish
In a separate bowl, combine milk and egg; whisk
Pour over pasta and add jar of sauce, can of tomatoes, garlic powder, and oregano
Mix all together well
On top of pasta mixture, layer the ground meat, then add a layer of pepperoni's
Sprinkle parmesan and Italian cheese
And layer more pepperoni
Bake in the oven at 350 degrees for 30 minutes

name: Creamy Ham and Tortellini
description: A delicious Creamy Ham and Tortellini recipe featuring Refrigerated cheese filled tortellini, Olive oil, and Onion.

directions.step: Cook and drain tortellini as directed on package
Meanwhile, in 12 inch skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat
Add onion, cook 4-5 minutes stirring frequently until lightly browned
Stir in ham and broccoli; cook 5 minutes, stirring occasionally
Stir in cream cheese; heat to just boiling over high heat
Stir in tortellini; reduce heat to medium; simmer 4-5 minutes until heated

name: Bow-Ties with Ham
description: A delicious Bow-Ties with Ham recipe featuring Bow-tie pasta, Alfredo pasta sauce, and Asparagus spears.

ingredients.name: Sun-dried tomatoes in oil and herbs

directions.step: Heat oven to 350 degrees
Spray 2-quart casserole dish with cooking spray
Cook and drain pasta as directed on package
In a 3-quart saucepan, heat alfredo sauce over medium heat, stirring frequently until hot
Gently stir in cooked pasta, asparagus, tomatoes, and ham
Stir in 1/2 cup of the cheese
Pour into casserole dish
Cover; bake 35-45 minutes or until bubbly
Top with remaining cheese

name: Ham, Broccoli, and Rice Skillet
description: A delicious Ham, Broccoli, and Rice Skillet recipe featuring Margarine, Onion, and Long grain and wild rice.

directions.step: In skillet, melt margarine over medium heat
Add onion and rice from mix; cook and stir 1-2 minutes or until onion begins to cook
Stir in 1 2/3 cups of water and contents of seasoning packet from mix; heat to boiling; reduce heat to medium-low
Cover and cook 10-15 minutes, stirring occasionally until broccoli is crisp tender and rice is tender

name: Panama Pork Stew
description: A delicious Panama Pork Stew recipe featuring Sweet potatoes, Frozen corn, and Frozen cut green beans.

ingredients.name: Lean pork (stew meat, chops, or tenderloins)

directions.step: Place potatoes, corn, green beans, and onion in bottom; top with pork
Mix tomatoes, 1 cup water, and spices together; pour over pork
Cook on low 7-9 hours
Serve alone with crusty bread or over rice

name: Pork Chops with Broccoli and Rice
description: A delicious Pork Chops with Broccoli and Rice recipe featuring Herb roasted chicken flavor long grain and wild rice mix, Fresh broccoli florets, and Vegetable oil.

ingredients.name: Herb roasted chicken flavor long grain and wild rice mix

directions.step: In 12-inch skillet, mix: rice, seasoning packet from rice mix, and 2 cups of water
Heat to boiling over medium heat
Cover; cook 7 minutes
Add broccoli; cook 3 minutes longer
Spoon rice and broccoli onto plates
Wipe out skillet
In same skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat
Sprinkle with salt and pepper, place in skillet
Cook 4-6 minutes or until browned
Turn pork; cook 4-5 minutes longer or until pork is no longer pink

name: Mustard Crusted Pork Roast
description: A delicious Mustard Crusted Pork Roast recipe featuring Boneless pork loin roast, Spicy mustard, Garlic croutons.

directions.step: Season roast with salt and pepper
Place in a shallow pan and roast for 30 minutes and sprinkle with crouton crumbs
Return to oven and continue to roast for 10-15 minutes longer until meat thermometer registers 155

name: Chinese Salad
description: A delicious Chinese Salad recipe featuring Sliced almonds, Granulated sugar, and Salad mix.

directions.step: Combine all dressing ingredients together
Mix until sugar dissolves (this is best done several hours ahead of time)
Saute sliced almonds with granulated sugar until brown
Spread onto foil to cool
Break apart large pieces into smaller ones
Pour salad mix, oranges, and almonds into salad bowl
Pour dressing over salad and toss

name: Crunchy Asian Slaw
description: A delicious Crunchy Asian Slaw recipe featuring Good Seasons Italian dressing mix, Sugar, and Soy sauce.

directions.step: Prepare dressing mix as directed (I usually do a bit less oil and more water)
Stir in sugar and soy sauce
In a large bowl, break apart noodles
Add coleslaw blend, scallions, sunflower seeds, and almonds; mix well
Add dressing just before serving

name: Oriental Cashew Chicken Salad
description: A delicious Oriental Cashew Chicken Salad recipe featuring Coleslaw, Scallions, and Perdue shortcuts - Italian grilled.

directions.step: Mix ingredients together in large bowl
For dressing: whisk together until it looks like duck sauce

name: Taco Salad
description: A delicious Taco Salad recipe featuring Ground beef or chicken, Onion, and Taco seasoning mix.

directions.step: Cook ground beef or chicken and onion; drain fat
Add taco seasoning mix and 1/2 cup of water; simmer for 15 minutes; let cool
Mix meat with lettuce, tomatoes, and cheese
Mix in dressings, taco sauce, and Doritos right before serving so Doritos don't get soggy

name: Crockpot Mexican Soup
description: A delicious Crockpot Mexican Soup recipe featuring Ground beef, sausage, or pork (browned) OR shredded chicken (cooked), Onion, and Garlic.

ingredients.name: Ground beef, sausage, or pork (browned) OR shredded chicken (cooked)

directions.step: Layer all ingredients up to (and including) chicken stock
Combine remaining ingredients in mixing bowl
Stir gently and seal 'er up
Cook on low for 4-6 hours

name: Chicken Taco Soup
description: A delicious Chicken Taco Soup recipe featuring Chicken breasts, Taco seasoning, and Mexicorn.

directions.step: Place chicken on the bottom of greased slow cooker and sprinkle with taco seasoning
Dump corn, black beans, picante sauce, chicken stock, and tomato paste on top and stir to combine
Cook on high for 3 hours
Shred chicken with fork and add cream cheese and sour cream
Give the cream cheese a few minutes to melt; stir to incorporate all ingredients
Serve with some shredded cheese on top

name: Barley-Vegetable Soup
description: A delicious Barley-Vegetable Soup recipe featuring Barley, Dried bay leaf, and Baby carrots.

directions.step: Layer all ingredients (except broth and tomatoes) in the following order: barley, bay leaf, carrots, celery, onion, green pepper, garlic, sweet potato, corn, green beans
Pour broth and 6 cups of water over ingredients; do not stir
Cover and cook on low 6-8 hours or until barley is tender
10 minutes before serving, stir in tomatoes
Cover and cook 10 minutes
Remove bay leaf

name: Chicken Tortellini Soup
description: A delicious Chicken Tortellini Soup recipe featuring Frozen cut broccoli, Condensed chicken broth, and Cooked chicken.

directions.step: Remove broccoli from freezer; thaw
In 5-quart saucepan, mix all remaining ingredients except tortellini and cheese
Heat to boiling
Stir in tortellini, reduce heat; simmer uncovered 30 minutes, stirring occasionally
Stir in thawed broccoli, simmer 5-10 minutes longer until broccoli is crisp and tender

name: Cheesy Potato Soup
description: A delicious Cheesy Potato Soup recipe featuring Bacon, Onion, and Russet potatoes.

ingredients.name: Shredded American and Cheddar cheese blend

directions.step: In 12-inch skillet, cook bacon over medium heat, turning occasionally until browned and crispy
Remove from skillet, reserving fat in skillet
Drain bacon on paper towel, then refrigerate
In same skillet, cook onion in bacon fat over medium heat for 4-5 minutes, stirring frequently until tender
Spray 3 1/4 to 4 quart slow cooker with cooking spray
In cooker, mix: onion, potatoes, celery, broth, salt, and pepper
Cover; cook on low heat setting for 6-7 hours
In small bowl, beat flour and half-and-half with wire whisk until well blended; stir into soup
Increase heat setting to high
Cover; cook about 30 minutes longer or until thickened
Stir in cheese until well melted
Crumble bacon; sprinkle over soup

name: Easy Bean and Kielbasa Soup
description: A delicious Easy Bean and Kielbasa Soup recipe featuring 15 or 16 dried bean soup mix, Kielbasa, and Chicken broth.

ingredients.name: Kielbasa
ingredients.prep: Cut lengthwise in half then cut crosswise into slices

directions.step: In slow cooker, mix all ingredients except tomatoes
Cover and cook on low 8-10 hours
Stir in tomatoes, increase heat to high
Cover and cook 15 minutes or until hot

name: Chicken Tortilla Soup
description: A delicious Chicken Tortilla Soup recipe featuring Boneless chicken breasts, Diced tomatoes, and Chunky salsa.

directions.step: Set crockpot heat to high
Add raw chopped chicken into crockpot as well as the chopped onion and broth; stir (you can add whole breasts and shred once fully cooked)
Add remaining ingredients and set crockpot to low heat
Let cook for ~3-4 hours depending on your crockpot
Top soup with sour cream, cilantro, and avocado slices
Serve with tortilla chips and enjoy

name: Homemade Chicken Noodle Soup
description: A delicious Homemade Chicken Noodle Soup recipe featuring Chicken fillets, Chicken thighs, and Vegetable oil.

directions.step: Cook chicken, rub a little vegetable oil over the surface of each piece of chicken
Arrange the chicken on a baking sheet and bake for 25 minutes
Melt butter in a large saucepan over medium heat
Saute the onion and celery for 4-5 minutes, but don't brown them
Dice the chicken and add to the pot
Add chicken broth, 2 cups of water, carrots, and pepper to taste
Bring soup to a boil, reduce heat, and allow to simmer for 30 minutes or until the carrots are soft
Add noodles or rice and simmer for an additional 15-20 minutes

name: Taco soup
description: A delicious Taco soup recipe featuring Onion, Chili beans, and Black beans.

directions.step: Dump all ingredients, except chicken, into crockpot
Lay chicken on top and push under broth
Cover; cook on low for 5 hours

name: Vegetable Minestrone
description: A delicious Vegetable Minestrone recipe featuring Yellow summer squash, Carrots, and Bell pepper.

directions.step: Mix: squash, carrots, bell peppers, pea pods, onion, marinara sauce, beans, and 4 cups of water in 3.5-6 quart slow cooker
Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours
Stir in pasta, sugar, salt, and pepper
Cover and cook on high heat setting for 15-20 minutes or until pasta is tender
Sprinkle with cheese

name: Sausage Bean Soup
description: A delicious Sausage Bean Soup recipe featuring Sausage, Corn, and Pinto beans.

directions.step: Mix it all together in the crockpot with an extra can of water
Let sit on low all day

name: Santa Fe Soup
description: A delicious Santa Fe Soup recipe featuring Ground turkey, Green pepper, and Onion.

directions.step: Saute turkey and onions; drain any fat
Add remaining ingredients and simmer for 2 hours
Serve with tortilla chips, cheese, and sour cream

name: Slow Cooker Italian Chicken - Pasta Soup
description: A delicious Slow Cooker Italian Chicken - Pasta Soup recipe featuring Chicken thighs, Carrots, and Onion.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients except pasta in slow cooker
Cover and cook on low setting for 8-10 hours
About 30 minutes before serving, stir in pasta
Increase heat setting to high
Cover and cook 20-30 minutes or until pasta is tender

name: Quick Chicken Corn Chowder
description: A delicious Quick Chicken Corn Chowder recipe featuring Butter, Onion, and Celery.

directions.step: Melt margarine in large dutch oven
Add onion and celery; cook 3 minutes or until tender
Add flour
Cook 1 minute, stirring constantly
Stir in milk and remaining ingredients
Do not let soup boil because it will separate

name: Vegetable Beef Barley Soup
description: A delicious Vegetable Beef Barley Soup recipe featuring Stew meat, Bell pepper, and Green beans.

directions.step: Mix all ingredients with 1 1/2 cups of water
Cover and cook on low for 8-9 hours

name: Green Bean Casserole
description: A delicious Green Bean Casserole recipe featuring Cream of chicken soup, Milk, and Soy sauce.

directions.step: In 1 1/2 quart casserole dish, mix: soup, milk, soy sauce, beans, and 1/2 can onions
Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes; stir
Sprinkle remaining onion over bean mixture
Bake 5 minutes more or until onions are golden

name: Grandma's Stuffing
description: A conversation between my mother, Jean, and my grandmother, Yucel, about how to make her stuffing

directions.step: Jean: I am really glad you are coming up for Thanksgiving, it will be fun; In fact, I need your recipe for stuffing
Yucel: Oh that is really easy
Jean: Easy for you to say, I have never made homemade stuffing
Yucel: I don't measure anything so I'll have to tell you to judge by eye
Jean: oh no
Yucel: Break up stuffing bread into chunks
Jean: Do they sell bread called stuffing bread at the store, I don't think I've ever seen it
Yucel: In between pour in some chopped onions, bell stuffing seasoning, and melted butter
Yucel: Yes, it comes unsliced, and is called stuffing bread, unseasoned
Jean: ok
Yucel: Depending on the size of the turkey, you probably need 2 loaves
Jean: 18 pds
Yucel: For an 18-20 lb turkey, I usually use 2 sticks of butter and 1 large onion
Jean: ok and just mix them together?
Yucel: The seasoning I couldn't tell you like I said I just sprinkle it off and on
Jean: And keep taste testing
Yucel: Then pour some boiling water over it just to moisten it and also that makes handling and stuffing easier. Some salt and pepper, go easy on the salt; that's it
Jean: Well, if nothing else this first time will be interesting

name: Sweet Potato Cassrole
description: A delicious Sweet Potato Cassrole recipe featuring Sweet potato, Granulated sugar, and Egg.

directions.step: Cook sweet potato in boiling water  until tender; drain and mash
In a large bowl, mix together sweet potato, white sugar, egg, butter, milk, and vanilla
Mix until smooth; transfer to 9x13 dish
In medium bowl, mix brown sugar and flour
Cut in butter until mixture is coarse
Stir in pecans
Sprinkle the mixture over potatoes
Bake 30 minutes

name: Cook the Potatoes
description: A delicious Cook the Potatoes recipe featuring Milk, Velveeta, and Butter.

directions.step: Cook on low until it is boiling, then pour over potatoes and bake at 350 degrees until golden brown

name: Sun-Dried Tomato Spaghetti
description: A delicious Sun-Dried Tomato Spaghetti recipe featuring Sun-dried tomatoes, Garlic, and Grape tomatoes.

directions.step: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Wash and dry produce

Finely chop sun-dried tomatoes. Peel and mince or grate garlic. Halve grape tomatoes lengthwise; place in a small bowl and toss with a drizzle of olive oil, salt, and pepper. Pick parsley leaves from stems (if necessary); finely chop leaves
Once water is boiling, add spaghetti to pot. Cook, stirring occasionally, until al dente (9-11 minutes). Reserve 1/3 cup of pasta cooking water and drain

While pasta cooks, heat a large, dry pan over medium-high heat. Add almonds and cook, stirring often until fragrant and lightly brown (2-4 minutes). Turn off heat, transfer to a second small bowl. Wipe out pan
Heat a drizzle of olive oil in pan used for almonds over medium heat. Add sun-dried tomatoes and garlic; cook, stirring occasionally, until fragrant (1-2 minutes). Season with salt and pepper
Stir in stock concentrate and 1/3 cup of plain water. Bring to a simmer and cook until slightly reduced (1-2 minutes)
Reduce heat to low and whisk in cream cheese until fully incorporated
Stir grape tomatoes into pan with sauce. Add drained spaghetti, half the parmesan, and 1 tablespoon of butter. Toss to combine
Stir in half the chopped parsley. Season with salt and pepper. Turn off heat
Divide pasta between bowls. Top with toasted almonds, remaining parmesan, and remaining chopped parsley. Serve

name: Creamy Dijon Dill Chicken
description: A delicious Creamy Dijon Dill Chicken recipe featuring Potatoes, Broccoli florets, and Dill.

directions.step: Adjust racks to top and middle positions and preheat oven to 450 degrees. Wash and dry produce
Dice potatoes into 1/2 inch pieces
Cut broccoli florets into bite-size pieces if necessary
Pick and finely chop fronds from dill
Toss potatoes on a baking sheet with a drizzle of oil and a pinch of salt and pepper
Roast on top rack until lightly browned and tender. 20-25 minutes
Meanwhile, pat chicken dry with a paper towel and season all over with salt and pepper
Heat a drizzle of olive oil in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add chicken and cook until browned and cooked through. 3-5 minutes per side
Turn off heat; transfer chicken to a cutting board to rest
While chicken cooks, toss broccoli on a second baking sheet with a drizzle of oil and a pinch of salt and pepper. Roast on middle rack until tender. 12-15 minutes
Heat pan used for chicken over medium heat. Stir in stock concentrate, 2 tablespoons of water, and as much chopped dill and mustard as you like
Remove pan from heat; stir in sour cream and 1 tablespoon of butter, scraping up any browned bits from bottom of pan. Season with salt and pepper
Slice chicken crosswise; divide chicken, potatoes, and broccoli between plates and drizzle with sauce. Garnish with any remaining chopped dill if desired and serve

name: Brussel Sprout Hash
description: Sheet pan dinner with vegetables and eggs

directions.step: Trim the brussels sprouts, halve them lengthwise and coarsely chop. (The sprouts will fall apart, but this is fine.)
Transfer the brussels sprouts to a large bowl. Add the potatoes, thyme, shallots, garlic and olive oil and stir to combine.
Place the vegetables in a single layer on the prepared baking sheet and season generously with salt and pepper.
Roast for 15 minutes, then stir the vegetables and spread them out in a single layer again. Drizzle with a little more olive oil if they seem dry.
Continue roasting until the vegetables are golden and fork-tender, about 15 minutes longer.

Cook eggs as desired or using a spoon, make 8 small wells in the vegetables for the eggs. Crack 1 egg into each well and season with salt and pepper. Bake until the eggs are mostly set, 6 to 8 minutes.
Serve with hot sauce if desired

name: Crockpot Chicken Taco Chili
description: A delicious Crockpot Chicken Taco Chili recipe featuring Onion, Black beans, and Kidney beans.

directions.step: Combine beans, onion, chili peppers, corn, tomato sauce, cumin, chili powder, and taco seasoning in a slow cooker
Place chicken on top and cover
Cook on low for 10 hours or on high for 6 hours
A half hour before serving, remove chicken and shred
Return chicken to slow cooker and stir in
Top with fresh cilantro

name: Creamy Sausage Tortellini Soup
description: Creamy sausage and tortellini soup is a bowl full of comfort! It's loaded with veggies, sausage and cheese tortellini- plus it comes together in just 45 minutes!

ingredients.name: Half and half or heavy cream

directions.step: In a large stockpot set over medium-high, cook the sausage until browned. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the cooked sausage to a paper towel lined plate; set aside

Add onion, shallot and carrot, saute for 5 minutes or until the vegetables are soft. Add the garlic and saute for an additional 2 minutes, or until fragrant, stirring occasionally to prevent it from burning

Whisk in the flour and cook for 1 minute. Gradually add in the chicken broth, whisk to combine. Continue cooking until the mixture reaches a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 6 minutes

Pat as much grease as possible off of the sausage, then add it along with the tortellini, salt, pepper, Italian seasoning, spinach, and half & half. Simmer for 5 minutes, or until the tortellini is fully cooked
Serve immediately with freshly grated parmesan, if desired

name: Banana Bread
description: A mildy sweet and moist quick bread that everyone loves.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Grease and flour (or line with parchment paper) an 8x4 inch loaf pan
In a small bowl, whisk together flour, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon
In a separate medium bowl, add butter, brown sugar, and white sugar. Mix with a hand mixer on medium speed until fluffy, about 2 minutes. Add the eggs and vanilla and mix well. Stir in mashed bananas
Add the dry ingredients to the banana mixture and stir until combined, do not overmix
Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan and bake for 50-60 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean. Do not overbake
Cool in the pan 5 minutes. Remove from pan and cool completely on a rack

name: Healthy Turkey Chili
description:
Prep: 20 minutes; Cook: 6.5 hours
Taken from tasteofhome.com

directions.step: In a large skillet, cook and crumble turkey with celery, onion, and green pepper over medium-high heat until turkey is no longer pink (6-8 minutes). Transfer to 5 quart slow cooker. Stir in seasonings, tomatoes, pasta sauce, chili beans, water, and corn.
Cook, covered, on high for 1 hour. Reduce setting to low; cook, covered, 5-6 hours or until flavors are blended
Stir in kidney beans and pinto beans; cook, covered on low 30 minutes longer. If desired, serve with sour cream, avocado, and jalepeno

name: Cool Beans Salad
description: tasteofhome.com

directions.step: In a large bowl, whisk the first 8 ingredients. Add the remaining ingredients; toss to coat. Chill until serving

name: Easy Oven Baked Salmon
description: A very good, very easy salmon recipe that I've had many times.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 400 degrees and grease a large baking pan. Arrange salmon fillets on the baking sheet and season generously with salt and pepper

Stir together olive oil, garlic, herbs, and juice of 1/2 lemon. Spoon over salmon fillets being sure to rub all over the tops and sides of the salmon so it has no dry spots. Thinly slice remaining 1/2 lemon and top each piece of salmon with a slice of lemon
Bake for 12-15 minutes until salmon is opaque and flaky when pulled apart with a fork. You can broil the last 1-2 minutes if desired
Garnish with fresh thyme or parsley if desired and serve

name: Roasted Sweet Potatoes
description: An easy sweet potato recipe. Great as a healthy side!

directions.step: Heat oven to 425 degrees. Lightly spray a sheet pan with oil
Cut the sweet potatoes into 3/4 inch cubes
In a large bowl, toss the sweet potato wedges with olive oil and season with garlic powder, paprika, rosemary, salt, and black pepper to taste
Spread out in an even layer on the sheet pan and bake 30-35 minutes, tossing every 10-15 minutes until tender, golden, and browned on the edges

name: Bang Bang Brussel Sprouts
description: Deliciously spicy oven-fried brussel sprouts.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 425 degrees. In a small bowl, whisk together oil, sweet chili sauce, Sriracha, lime juice, and garlic
On a large baking sheet, toss brussel sprouts in sauce until fully coated and season generously with salt and pepper
Roast until brussel sprouts are slightly charred and tender, 30-35 minutes

name: Sausage Potato Soup
description:
This is the stovetop version of this recipe
This Creamy Sausage Potato Soup is made with hot or sweet Italian sausage with potatoes and vegetables. it's an easy soup recipe for the stove top or the Crock Pot!
Taken from The Cozy Cook

directions.step: Remove the casings from the sausage if you purchased links
Preheat a large pot over medium heat
Add the sausage; cook and crumble to break it apart
Once cooked halfway through, cover partially and continue to heat, stirring occasionally, until cooked through. It'll take ~10-12 minutes total
Set the sausage aside and reserve 1 tablespoon drippings (butter can be used if you don't have drippings
Add the drippings to the pot along with 2 tablespoons butter over medium heat. Add the diced onion, celery, and carrots and cook for 5 minutes
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute
Add the flour and cook for 2 minutes
Add the chicken broth in splashes, and use a silicone spatula to "clean" the bottom of the pot to add more flavor to the soup
Slowly stir in the heavy cream, hot sauce, soy sauce, and seasonings
Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer
Clean the potatoes and pat them dry. Cut into 1-inch cubes and add them to the soup
Simmer, uncovered, until the potatoes are fork tender (~20-25 minutes). add the sausage back and stir to combine
Reduce heat to low and stir in the cheddar cheese (if desired)
Garnish with red pepper flakes and parsley. Serve!

name: Sausage Potato Soup (Crockpot)
description:
This is the crockpot version of the recipe.
This Creamy Sausage Potato Soup is made with hot or sweet Italian sausage with potatoes and vegetables. it's an easy soup recipe for the stove top or the Crock Pot!
Taken from The Cozy Cook

directions.step: Cook and crumble the sausage in a large skillet over medium heat on the stove top. Halfway through cooking, add the onions, carrots, celery, and garlic. Once the sausage is cooked through and the vegetables are softened, drain grease well and transfer to the crockpot
Add all remaining ingredients to the crockpot EXCEPT the heavy cream and cheddar cheese
Cook on low for 6 hours or on high for 4 hours
Reduce heat to warm and slowly stir in the heavy cream until combined. Turn the heat off
If desired, sprinkle in the cheese and stir until combined. Serve!

name: Easy Baked Chicken and Zucchini
description:
This Baked Chicken and Zucchini Recipe is easy to make, and everything is baked perfectly in a casserole dish. It’s the ultimate easy dinner for a hungry family.

This recipe was taken from poshplate.us/easy-baked-chicken-and-zucchini-recipe

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.prep: Chopped into large pieces, similar to the size of the chicken

ingredients.name: Zucchini
ingredients.prep: Sliced vertically into four large pieces, then chopped into smaller pieces

directions.step: Preheat oven to 425 degrees
In a large bowl, add all of the spices, salt, and pepper. Then, add the olive oil and mix everything until a "marinade" forms
When ready, add the cut-up chicken, onion, and zucchini to the marinade. Next, give a toss to fully incorporate the ingredients with the seasonings. You may marinate this for up to 24 hours.
Transfer the chicken and veggies to a baking dish and bake it in the oven uncovered at 425°F for 30 minutes.
Enjoy while hot and serve with fluffy quinoa or buttery rice.

name: An Apple a Day
description:
A bourbon-based beverage created by Bob Peters.

This is the idea drink to enjoy during the festive holiday season or any time you want, to indulge in the comforting flavors of apple.

directions.step: Add 1.75 oz of bourbon, 1 oz Cranberry Apple Spice Syrup, and 0.5 oz of fresh pressed orange juice into your shaker with ice.
Shake and then double strain into rocks glass.
Top with 2 oz of Volley spicy ginger tequila seltzer or fill to brim as desired
Garnish with dehydrated apple

name: My New Red Rider
description:
This is a bourbon based drink created by Bob Peters.
Warm notes of vanilla and ginger combine with this beautiful bourbon creating an unbelievable cocktail that will keep you warm all winter long. Cheers!

directions.step: Add 1.75 oz bourbon, 0.5 oz vanilla ginger syrup, and 0.5 oz orange juice into your shaker with ice.
Shake and then double strain into a rocks glass with fresh ice. Top with approximately 2 oz Volley spicy ginger or fill to brim as desired.
Garnish with dehydrated blood orange

name: Honey Glazed Roasted Carrots
description:
These simple Roasted Carrots are a classic side dish that only need 10 minutes of prep time. The sweet and savory flavors of the seasoning blend mixed with honey and melted butter will have everyone wanting more!
Taken from houseofyumm.com (

directions.step: Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Slice the carrots at a diagonal, giving a nice flat part (this will give great surface area to carmelize)
Slice thicker pieces in half. Pieces should be 1 and 1/2 inches long. Place sliced carrots on a large baking sheet
In a small bowl add the melted butter, extra virgin olive oil, honey, garlic powder, salt, and pepper. Whisk together to combine
Drizzle the honey butter mixture over the carrots and stir to coat the carrots, spreading the carrots out in an even layer for baking
Bake at 425 degrees for 30 minutes, being sure to stir the carrots every 10 minutes to avoid burning
Remove from the oven and stir carrots to fully coat in remaining sauce. Allow to cool briefly before serving

name: Slow Cooker Honey Garlic Chicken
description: Easy recipe with 8 simple ingredients!

directions.step: Place the chicken in the bottom of a 6-quart or larger slow cooker. In a medium mixing bowl or very large measuring cup, whisk together the soy sauce, honey, tomato paste, chili paste, garlic, and rice vinegar. Pour over the chicken. Cover and cook on LOW for 4 to 5 hours or HIGH for 2 to 3 hours, until the chicken reaches an internal temperature of 165 degrees F on an instant-read thermometer. If you are available, flip the chicken over once halfway through to coat both sides. (If not, don’t stress; it will still be tasty.)

Remove the chicken to a plate and let cool slightly. Whisk the cornstarch into the slow cooker cooking liquid. Cover and cook on HIGH for 15 minutes, until the sauce thickens slightly, stirring occasionally. If you’d like the sauce particularly thick, you can cook it for a full 30 minutes in the slow cooker OR follow the stovetop method below.

For quicker sauce thickening, reduce the sauce on the stove: After whisking in the cornstarch, transfer the cooking liquid to a medium saucepan. Cook on the stovetop over medium heat, stirring often until the sauce thickens, 5 to 10 minutes. (If your slow cooker insert is stovetop safe, you can remove it from the slow cooker and place it directly on the burner, but do not do this unless you are POSITIVE your insert is stovetop safe or it may crack.)

With two forks (or your fingers if the chicken is cool enough), shred the chicken and place it in the slow cooker. If you reduced the sauce on the stove, add it back to the slow cooker now. Stir to coat the chicken with the sauce. Serve over rice, sprinkled with green onions and sesame seeds.

name: Baked Garlic Parmesan Chicken
description: Breaded chicken breasts flavored with garlic and Parmesan cheese are baked until golden and crispy for the easiest chicken dish ever. Serve with a salad and pasta for a quick, scrumptious dinner.

directions.step: Gather all ingredients. Preheat oven to 350. Lightly grease a 9x13 inch baking dish.
In a bowl, blend the olive oil and garlic
In a separate bowl, mix the bread crumbs, Parmesan cheese, basil, and pepper
Dip each chicken breast in the oil mixture, then in the bread crumb mixture. Arrange the coated chicken breasts in the prepared baking dish, and top with any remaining bread crumb mixture.
Bake 30 minutes in the preheated oven, or until chicken is no longer pink and juices run clear.

name: Slow Cooker Chicken Tacos
description: These easy slow cooker chicken tacos are easy to make with just 3 ingredients in your crockpot. Spoon the filling into warm tortillas for a very tasty meal any day of the week.

directions.step: Combine chicken broth and taco seasoning mix in a bowl
Place chicken in a slow cooker. Pour chicken broth mixture over chicken
Cook on low for 6 to 8 hours. Shred chicken

name: Panko Crusted Chicken with Lemon Cream Sauce
description: This panko chicken with lemon cream sauce is one of our favorite recipes to make for when guests come to dinner. It's super easy to make the panko breaded chicken and the lemon sauce for the chicken is only a couple of ingredients.

ingredients.name: Better than Bouillion, roasted chicken flavor

directions.step: Place the egg in a dish
In another dish, place the flour, salt, and pepper
In one last dish, place the panko, lemon zest, and parmesan cheese
Place the chicken between two pieces of plastic wrap or a ziploc bag and pound to 1/4 inch thick
Remove the breasts and slice them diagonally creating 4 chicken breasts instead of 2
Heat a skillet over medium-low heat and add 1 tablespoon of olive oil and 1 tablespoon of butter
Dredge the chicken in the flour mixture, then egg and lastly the panko
Add two breasts at a time to the skillet and cook 3-4 minutes per side or until golden and cooked through, adding more oil and butter to the pan as needed
Meanwhile, heat a saucepan over medium heat and add the butter, and concentrated stock
As the two begin to melt, add the garlic and cook until everything is melted together and the garlic is fragrant, about 1 minute
Add the flour and whisk vigorously. Everything will come together in a clump. Continue to whisk for an additional 30 seconds to 1 minute to cook our the flour-y taste
Quickly add the white wine and then the heavy cream
Season with salt and pepper
Whisk for a minute and reduce to a simmer, whisking occasionally, until thickened
Add the lemon zest, and lemon juice. Continue to whisk until everything is well incorporated.
Remove from heat and serve over the chicken alongside sides such as asparagus, roasted mashed potatoes, fingerlings etc.

name: Teriyaki Chicken Pasta Salad
description: Teriyaki Chicken loaded with veggies, mandarin oranges, pasta and of course a sesame dressing makes up the yummiest teriyaki chicken pasta salad ever!

directions.step: In a jar, combine teriyaki sauce, rice wine vinegar, soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic powder, ground ginger, onion powder, salt, black pepper, brown sugar, and canola oil
Cover with a lid and shake to combine
Refrigerate until ready to use
Chop the chicken and all veggies and toss with the pasta and dressing
Serve immediately

name: Garlic Parmesan Cauliflower
description: A delicious Garlic Parmesan Cauliflower recipe featuring Cauliflower, Olive oil, and Garlic cloves.

directions.step: Preheat oven to 425 degrees
Toss cauliflower in a large bowl with oil, salt, pepper, garlic, parmesan, and breadcrumbs
Spread on tray and roast for 20 minutes
Flip cauliflower, and roast for 5 more minutes
Sprinkle with parsley if wanted
